<p>The World Info System provides dynamic context injection for AI conversations by activating relevant lore, character details, and background information based on keywords detected in the chat. This system allows users to define entries that are automatically inserted into the AI prompt when specific conditions are met, enabling rich world-building without manually managing context.</p>
<p>For advanced World Info features such as timed effects, sticky entries, and automation triggers, see <a href="/SillyTavern/SillyTavern/6.2-chat-summarization-extension" class="text-neutral-300 hover:text-neutral-200 hover:underline">World Info Advanced Features</a>. For semantic search capabilities, see <a href="/SillyTavern/SillyTavern/6.3-vector-storage-and-rag-system" class="text-neutral-300 hover:text-neutral-200 hover:underline">Vector Search and Embeddings</a>.</p>
<hr>
<h2 id="system-overview" class="group" data-header="true">System Overview<button class="relative ml-2 cursor-pointer align-baseline text-gray-400 opacity-0 transition-opacity hover:text-blue-400 focus:opacity-100 group-hover:opacity-100" aria-label="Copy link to header"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="1em" height="1em" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 256 256" class="h-4 w-4"><path d="M117.18,188.74a12,12,0,0,1,0,17l-5.12,5.12A58.26,58.26,0,0,1,70.6,228h0A58.62,58.62,0,0,1,29.14,127.92L63.89,93.17a58.64,58.64,0,0,1,98.56,28.11,12,12,0,1,1-23.37,5.44,34.65,34.65,0,0,0-58.22-16.58L46.11,144.89A34.62,34.62,0,0,0,70.57,204h0a34.41,34.41,0,0,0,24.49-10.14l5.11-5.12A12,12,0,0,1,117.18,188.74ZM226.83,45.17a58.65,58.65,0,0,0-82.93,0l-5.11,5.11a12,12,0,0,0,17,17l5.12-5.12a34.63,34.63,0,1,1,49,49L175.1,145.86A34.39,34.39,0,0,1,150.61,156h0a34.63,34.63,0,0,1-33.69-26.72,12,12,0,0,0-23.38,5.44A58.64,58.64,0,0,0,150.56,180h.05a58.28,58.28,0,0,0,41.47-17.17l34.75-34.75a58.62,58.62,0,0,0,0-82.91Z"></path></svg></button></h2>
<p>World Info (also called "lorebooks") consists of entries that contain:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>Keys</strong>: Primary and secondary keywords that trigger the entry</li>
<li><strong>Content</strong>: Text to inject into the prompt when activated</li>
<li><strong>Configuration</strong>: Settings controlling when and how the entry activates</li>
</ul>
<p>The system scans recent chat messages and other context sources to determine which entries should be active, then allocates token budget to include as many relevant entries as possible within constraints.</p>

<p>The <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">WorldInfoBuffer</code> class manages the scanning buffer for one evaluation cycle. It maintains three types of buffers:</p>

























<table><thead><tr><th>Buffer Type</th><th>Purpose</th><th>Populated By</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td>Depth Buffer</td><td>Recent chat messages ordered by depth</td><td>Constructor initialization</td></tr><tr><td>Recurse Buffer</td><td>Content added by recursive scanning</td><td>Entry activation with <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">scan_depth</code></td></tr><tr><td>Inject Buffer</td><td>Valid prompt injections for current scan</td><td>Extension system</td></tr></tbody></table>
<p>The buffer provides methods to:</p>

<p><strong>Entry Matching Flags:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li><code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">entry.matchPersonaDescription</code> - Include user persona in scan</li>

<pre class="px-2 py-1.5 has-[code]:rounded-md has-[code]:!bg-[#e5e5e5] has-[div]:bg-transparent has-[div]:!p-0 has-[code]:text-stone-900 dark:has-[code]:!bg-[#242424] has-[code]:dark:text-white [&_code]:block [&_code]:border-none [&_code]:bg-transparent [&_code]:p-0"><pre class="not-prose m-0 w-full bg-transparent p-[6px_8px]"><code class="block" style="white-space: pre; font-size: 12px;"><div class="whitespace-pre"><span style="color:#D73A49">export</span><span style="color:#D73A49"> const</span><span style="color:#005CC5"> scan_state</span><span style="color:#D73A49"> =</span><span style="color:#24292E"> {</span></div><div class="whitespace-pre"><span style="color:#24292E">    NONE: </span><span style="color:#005CC5">0</span><span style="color:#24292E">,        </span><span style="color:#6A737D">// Scanning stopped</span></div><div class="whitespace-pre"><span style="color:#24292E">    INITIAL: </span><span style="color:#005CC5">1</span><span style="color:#24292E">,     </span><span style="color:#6A737D">// First scan pass</span></div><div class="whitespace-pre"><span style="color:#24292E">    RECURSION: </span><span style="color:#005CC5">2</span><span style="color:#24292E">,   </span><span style="color:#6A737D">// Triggered by recursion</span></div><div class="whitespace-pre"><span style="color:#24292E">    MIN_ACTIVATIONS: </span><span style="color:#005CC5">3</span><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Seeking minimum activations</span></div><div class="whitespace-pre"><span style="color:#24292E">};</span></div></code></pre></pre>

<h3 id="key-matching-logic" class="group" data-header="true">Key Matching Logic<button class="relative ml-2 cursor-pointer align-baseline text-gray-400 opacity-0 transition-opacity hover:text-blue-400 focus:opacity-100 group-hover:opacity-100" aria-label="Copy link to header"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="1em" height="1em" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 256 256" class="h-4 w-4"><path d="M117.18,188.74a12,12,0,0,1,0,17l-5.12,5.12A58.26,58.26,0,0,1,70.6,228h0A58.62,58.62,0,0,1,29.14,127.92L63.89,93.17a58.64,58.64,0,0,1,98.56,28.11,12,12,0,1,1-23.37,5.44,34.65,34.65,0,0,0-58.22-16.58L46.11,144.89A34.62,34.62,0,0,0,70.57,204h0a34.41,34.41,0,0,0,24.49-10.14l5.11-5.12A12,12,0,0,1,117.18,188.74ZM226.83,45.17a58.65,58.65,0,0,0-82.93,0l-5.11,5.11a12,12,0,0,0,17,17l5.12-5.12a34.63,34.63,0,1,1,49,49L175.1,145.86A34.39,34.39,0,0,1,150.61,156h0a34.63,34.63,0,0,1-33.69-26.72,12,12,0,0,0-23.38,5.44A58.64,58.64,0,0,0,150.56,180h.05a58.28,58.28,0,0,0,41.47-17.17l34.75-34.75a58.62,58.62,0,0,0,0-82.91Z"></path></svg></button></h3>
<p>Keys can be plain text or regular expressions (format: <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">/pattern/flags</code>). The <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">matchKeys()</code> method in <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">WorldInfoBuffer</code> implements the following logic:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong>Regex Detection</strong>: If <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">needle</code> matches <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">/regex/flags</code> format, use <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">parseRegexFromString(needle)</code> <a href="https://github.com/SillyTavern/SillyTavern/blob/e41bcf0c/world-info.js#L2865-L2909" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" <li><strong>Case Transformation</strong>: Apply <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">#transformString(str, entry)</code> <a href="https://github.com/SillyTavern/SillyTavern/blob/e41bcf0c/world-info.js#L268-L271" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="mb-1 mr-1 inline-flex items-stretch font-mono text-xs !no-underline transition-opacity hover:opacity-75"><span class="flex items-center break-all rounded-l px-2 py-1.5 bg-[#e5e5e5] text-[#333333] dark:bg-[#252525] dark:text-[#e4e4e4]"><svg class="mr-1.5 hidden h-3.5 w-3.5 flex-shrink-0 opacity-40 md:block" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 0c-6.626 0-12 5.373-12 12 0 5.302 3.438 9.8 8.207 11.387.599.111.793-.261.793-.577v-2.234c-3.338.726-4.033-1.416-4.033-1.416-.546-1.387-1.333-1.756-1.333-1.756-1.089-.745.083-.729.083-.729 1.205.084 1.839 1.237 1.839 1.237 1.07 1.834 2.807 1.304 3.492.997.107-.775.418-1.305.762-1.604-2.665-.305-5.467-1.334-5.467-5.931 0-1.311.469-2.381 1.236-3.221-.124-.303-.535-1.524.117-3.176 0 0 1.008-.322 3.301 1.23.957-.266 1.983-.399 3.003-.404 1.02.005 2.047.138 3.006.404 2.291-1.552 3.297-1.23 3.297-1.23.653 1.653.242 2.874.118 3.176.77.84 1.235 1.911 1.235 3.221 0 4.609-2.807 5.624-5.479 5.921.43.372.823 1.102.823 2.222v3.293c0 .319.192.694.801.576 4.765-1.589 8.199-6.086 8.199-11.386 0-6.627-5.373-12-12-12z"></path></svg>world-info.js</span><span class="flex flex-shrink-0 items-center rounded-r border-l px-2 py-1.5 border-[#dddddd] bg-[#d8d8d8] text-[#666666] dark:border-[#333333] dark:bg-[#2a2a2a] dark:text-[#888888]">268-271</span></a> based on <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">entry.caseSensitive ?? world_info_case_sensitive</code></li>
<li><strong>Whole Word Matching</strong>: If <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">entry.matchWholeWords ?? world_info_match_whole_words</code> is enabled:
<ul>
<li>Multi-word phrases: Use simple <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">includes()</code> check</li>
<li>Single words: Use regex pattern <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">(?:^|\\W)(escapedKeyword)(?:$|\\W)</code> with word boundaries</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ol>

<p>Secondary keys use logic operators to refine activation:</p>
<pre class="px-2 py-1.5 has-[code]:rounded-md has-[code]:!bg-[#e5e5e5] has-[div]:bg-transparent has-[div]:!p-0 has-[code]:text-stone-900 dark:has-[code]:!bg-[#242424] has-[code]:dark:text-white [&_code]:block [&_code]:border-none [&_code]:bg-transparent [&_code]:p-0"><pre class="not-prose m-0 w-full bg-transparent p-[6px_8px]"><code class="block" style="white-space: pre; font-size: 12px;"><div class="whitespace-pre"><span style="color:#D73A49">export</span><span style="color:#D73A49"> const</span><span style="color:#005CC5"> world_info_logic</span><span style="color:#D73A49"> =</span><span style="color:#24292E"> {</span></div><div class="whitespace-pre"><span style="color:#24292E">    AND_ANY: </span><span style="color:#005CC5">0</span><span style="color:#24292E">,   </span><span style="color:#6A737D">// Primary keys OR any secondary key</span></div><div class="whitespace-pre"><span style="color:#24292E">    NOT_ALL: </span><span style="color:#005CC5">1</span><span style="color:#24292E">,   </span><span style="color:#6A737D">// Primary keys AND NOT all secondary keys</span></div><div class="whitespace-pre"><span style="color:#24292E">    NOT_ANY: </span><span style="color:#005CC5">2</span><span style="color:#24292E">,   </span><span style="color:#6A737D">// Primary keys AND NOT any secondary key</span></div><div class="whitespace-pre"><span style="color:#24292E">    AND_ALL: </span><span style="color:#005CC5">3</span><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Primary keys AND all secondary keys</span></div><div class="whitespace-pre"><span style="color:#24292E">};</span></div></code></pre></pre>
<p><strong>Scoring Calculation:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Each matched primary key adds 1 to score</li>
<li>Secondary keys affect final score based on logic type</li>
<li><code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">AND_ANY</code>: Add secondary score to primary score</li>
<li><code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">AND_ALL</code>: Only add secondary score if all secondary keys match</li>
<li><code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">NOT_*</code>: Negative logic reduces or blocks activation</li>
</ul>

<h2 id="recursion-system" class="group" data-header="true">Recursion System<button class="relative ml-2 cursor-pointer align-baseline text-gray-400 opacity-0 transition-opacity hover:text-blue-400 focus:opacity-100 group-hover:opacity-100" aria-label="Copy link to header"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="1em" height="1em" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 256 256" class="h-4 w-4"><path d="M117.18,188.74a12,12,0,0,1,0,17l-5.12,5.12A58.26,58.26,0,0,1,70.6,228h0A58.62,58.62,0,0,1,29.14,127.92L63.89,93.17a58.64,58.64,0,0,1,98.56,28.11,12,12,0,1,1-23.37,5.44,34.65,34.65,0,0,0-58.22-16.58L46.11,144.89A34.62,34.62,0,0,0,70.57,204h0a34.41,34.41,0,0,0,24.49-10.14l5.11-5.12A12,12,0,0,1,117.18,188.74ZM226.83,45.17a58.65,58.65,0,0,0-82.93,0l-5.11,5.11a12,12,0,0,0,17,17l5.12-5.12a34.63,34.63,0,1,1,49,49L175.1,145.86A34.39,34.39,0,0,1,150.61,156h0a34.63,34.63,0,0,1-33.69-26.72,12,12,0,0,0-23.38,5.44A58.64,58.64,0,0,0,150.56,180h.05a58.28,58.28,0,0,0,41.47-17.17l34.75-34.75a58.62,58.62,0,0,0,0-82.91Z"></path></svg></button></h2>
<p>Recursive scanning allows activated entries to trigger additional entries by including their content in subsequent scan passes.</p>
<h3 id="recursion-configuration" class="group" data-header="true">Recursion Configuration<button class="relative ml-2 cursor-pointer align-baseline text-gray-400 opacity-0 transition-opacity hover:text-blue-400 focus:opacity-100 group-hover:opacity-100" aria-label="Copy link to header"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="1em" height="1em" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 256 256" class="h-4 w-4"><path d="M117.18,188.74a12,12,0,0,1,0,17l-5.12,5.12A58.26,58.26,0,0,1,70.6,228h0A58.62,58.62,0,0,1,29.14,127.92L63.89,93.17a58.64,58.64,0,0,1,98.56,28.11,12,12,0,1,1-23.37,5.44,34.65,34.65,0,0,0-58.22-16.58L46.11,144.89A34.62,34.62,0,0,0,70.57,204h0a34.41,34.41,0,0,0,24.49-10.14l5.11-5.12A12,12,0,0,1,117.18,188.74ZM226.83,45.17a58.65,58.65,0,0,0-82.93,0l-5.11,5.11a12,12,0,0,0,17,17l5.12-5.12a34.63,34.63,0,1,1,49,49L175.1,145.86A34.39,34.39,0,0,1,150.61,156h0a34.63,34.63,0,0,1-33.69-26.72,12,12,0,0,0-23.38,5.44A58.64,58.64,0,0,0,150.56,180h.05a58.28,58.28,0,0,0,41.47-17.17l34.75-34.75a58.62,58.62,0,0,0,0-82.91Z"></path></svg></button></h3>
<ul>
<li><strong>Enable Recursion</strong>: <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">world_info_recursive</code> (global setting)</li>
<li><strong>Max Steps</strong>: <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">world_info_max_recursion_steps</code> (0 = unlimited, limited to prevent infinite loops)</li>
<li><strong>Per-Entry Control</strong>: <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">entry.excludeRecursion</code> (prevents entry from being scanned)</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="recursion-flow" class="group" data-header="true">Recursion Flow<button class="relative ml-2 cursor-pointer align-baseline text-gray-400 opacity-0 transition-opacity hover:text-blue-400 focus:opacity-100 group-hover:opacity-100" aria-label="Copy link to header"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="1em" height="1em" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 256 256" class="h-4 w-4"><path d="M117.18,188.74a12,12,0,0,1,0,17l-5.12,5.12A58.26,58.26,0,0,1,70.6,228h0A58.62,58.62,0,0,1,29.14,127.92L63.89,93.17a58.64,58.64,0,0,1,98.56,28.11,12,12,0,1,1-23.37,5.44,34.65,34.65,0,0,0-58.22-16.58L46.11,144.89A34.62,34.62,0,0,0,70.57,204h0a34.41,34.41,0,0,0,24.49-10.14l5.11-5.12A12,12,0,0,1,117.18,188.74ZM226.83,45.17a58.65,58.65,0,0,0-82.93,0l-5.11,5.11a12,12,0,0,0,17,17l5.12-5.12a34.63,34.63,0,1,1,49,49L175.1,145.86A34.39,34.39,0,0,1,150.61,156h0a34.63,34.63,0,0,1-33.69-26.72,12,12,0,0,0-23.38,5.44A58.64,58.64,0,0,0,150.56,180h.05a58.28,58.28,0,0,0,41.47-17.17l34.75-34.75a58.62,58.62,0,0,0,0-82.91Z"></path></svg></button></h3>

<li><code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">world_info_max_recursion_steps</code> <a href="https://github.com/SillyTavern/SillyTavern/blob/e41bcf0c/world-info.js#L82-L82" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="mb-1 mr-1 inline-flex items-stretch font-mono text-xs !no-underline transition-opacity hover:opacity-75"><span class="flex items-center break-all rounded-l px-2 py-1.5 bg-[#e5e5e5] text-[#333333] dark:bg-[#252525] dark:text-[#e4e4e4]"><svg class="mr-1.5 hidden h-3.5 w-3.5 flex-shrink-0 opacity-40 md:block" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 0c-6.626 0-12 5.373-12 12 0 5.302 3.438 9.8 8.207 11.387.599.111.793-.261.793-.577v-2.234c-3.338.726-4.033-1.416-4.033-1.416-.546-1.387-1.333-1.756-1.333-1.756-1.089-.745.083-.729.083-.729 1.205.084 1.839 1.237 1.839 1.237 1.07 1.834 2.807 1.304 3.492.997.107-.775.418-1.305.762-1.604-2.665-.305-5.467-1.334-5.467-5.931 0-1.311.469-2.381 1.236-3.221-.124-.303-.535-1.524.117-3.176 0 0 1.008-.322 3.301 1.23.957-.266 1.983-.399 3.003-.404 1.02.005 2.047.138 3.006.404 2.291-1.552 3.297-1.23 3.297-1.23.653 1.653.242 2.874.118 3.176.77.84 1.235 1.911 1.235 3.221 0 4.609-2.807 5.624-5.479 5.921.43.372.823 1.102.823 2.222v3.293c0 .319.192.694.801.576 4.765-1.589 8.199-6.086 8.199-11.386 0-6.627-5.373-12-12-12z"></path></svg>world-info.js</span><span class="flex flex-shrink-0 items-center rounded-r border-l px-2 py-1.5 border-[#dddddd] bg-[#d8d8d8] text-[#666666] dark:border-[#333333] dark:bg-[#2a2a2a] dark:text-[#888888]">82</span></a> - Maximum recursion depth (0 = unlimited, limited to 1000 by scan buffer)</li>
<li><code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">entry.excludeRecursion</code> <a href="https://github.com/SillyTavern/SillyTavern/blob/e41bcf0c/world-info.js#L2706-L2706" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="mb-1 mr-1 inline-flex items-stretch font-mono text-xs !no-underline transition-opacity hover:opacity-75"><span class="flex items-center break-all rounded-l px-2 py-1.5 bg-[#e5e5e5] text-[#333333] dark:bg-[#252525] dark:text-[#e4e4e4]"><svg class="mr-1.5 hidden h-3.5 w-3.5 flex-shrink-0 opacity-40 md:block" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 0c-6.626 0-12 5.373-12 12 0 5.302 3.438 9.8 8.207 11.387.599.111.793-.261.793-.577v-2.234c-3.338.726-4.033-1.416-4.033-1.416-.546-1.387-1.333-1.756-1.333-1.756-1.089-.745.083-.729.083-.729 1.205.084 1.839 1.237 1.839 1.237 1.07 1.834 2.807 1.304 3.492.997.107-.775.418-1.305.762-1.604-2.665-.305-5.467-1.334-5.467-5.931 0-1.311.469-2.381 1.236-3.221-.124-.303-.535-1.524.117-3.176 0 0 1.008-.322 3.301 1.23.957-.266 1.983-.399 3.003-.404 1.02.005 2.047.138 3.006.404 2.291-1.552 3.297-1.23 3.297-1.23.653 1.653.242 2.874.118 3.176.77.84 1.235 1.911 1.235 3.221 0 4.609-2.807 5.624-5.479 5.921.43.372.823 1.102.823 2.222v3.293c0 .319.192.694.801.576 4.765-1.589 8.199-6.086 8.199-11.386 0-6.627-5.373-12-12-12z"></path></svg>world-info.js</span><span class="flex flex-shrink-0 items-center rounded-r border-l px-2 py-1.5 border-[#dddddd] bg-[#d8d8d8] text-[#666666] dark:border-[#333333] dark:bg-[#2a2a2a] dark:text-[#888888]">2706</span></a> - Per-entry exclusion flag</li>
<li><code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">entry.scanDepth</code> <a href="https://github.com/SillyTavern/SillyTavern/blob/e41bcf0c/world-info.js#L2699-L2699" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="mb-1 mr-1 inline-flex items-stretch font-mono text-xs !no-underline transition-opacity hover:opacity-75"><span class="flex items-center break-all rounded-l px-2 py-1.5 bg-[#e5e5e5] text-[#333333] dark:bg-[#252525] dark:text-[#e4e4e4]"><svg class="mr-1.5 hidden h-3.5 w-3.5 flex-shrink-0 opacity-40 md:block" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 0c-6.626 0-12 5.373-12 12 0 5.302 3.438 9.8 8.207 11.387.599.111.793-.261.793-.577v-2.234c-3.338.726-4.033-1.416-4.033-1.416-.546-1.387-1.333-1.756-1.333-1.756-1.089-.745.083-.729.083-.729 1.205.084 1.839 1.237 1.839 1.237 1.07 1.834 2.807 1.304 3.492.997.107-.775.418-1.305.762-1.604-2.665-.305-5.467-1.334-5.467-5.931 0-1.311.469-2.381 1.236-3.221-.124-.303-.535-1.524.117-3.176 0 0 1.008-.322 3.301 1.23.957-.266 1.983-.399 3.003-.404 1.02.005 2.047.138 3.006.404 2.291-1.552 3.297-1.23 3.297-1.23.653 1.653.242 2.874.118 3.176.77.84 1.235 1.911 1.235 3.221 0 4.609-2.807 5.624-5.479 5.921.43.372.823 1.102.823 2.222v3.293c0 .319.192.694.801.576 4.765-1.589 8.199-6.086 8.199-11.386 0-6.627-5.373-12-12-12z"></path></svg>world-info.js</span><span class="flex flex-shrink-0 items-center rounded-r border-l px-2 py-1.5 border-[#dddddd] bg-[#d8d8d8] text-[#666666] dark:border-[#333333] dark:bg-[#2a2a2a] dark:text-[#888888]">2699</span></a> - Custom scan depth for recursive entries</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Recursion Process:</strong></p>
<ol>
<li><strong>Initial Scan</strong> (<code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">scan_state.INITIAL</code>): Activate entries based on chat messages</li>
<li><strong>Recurse Buffer Population</strong>: If <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">world_info_recursive === true</code>, call <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">buffer.addRecurse(entry.content)</code> for activated entries with <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">entry.scanDepth > 0</code> and <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">entry.excludeRecursion === false</code></li>
<li><strong>Recursion Scan</strong> (<code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">scan_state.RECURSION</code>): Perform additional scan pass where <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">buffer.get(entry, scanState)</code> includes <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">#recurseBuffer</code> contents</li>
<li><strong>Iteration</strong>: Continue until no new activations or <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">world_info_max_recursion_steps</code> reached</li>
</ol>
<p><strong>Example:</strong></p>
<pre class="px-2 py-1.5 has-[code]:rounded-md has-[code]:!bg-[#e5e5e5] has-[div]:bg-transparent has-[div]:!p-0 has-[code]:text-stone-900 dark:has-[code]:!bg-[#242424] has-[code]:dark:text-white [&_code]:block [&_code]:border-none [&_code]:bg-transparent [&_code]:p-0"><code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">Entry A: key=["dragon"], content="Dragons breathe fire breath", scanDepth=4
Entry B: key=["fire breath"], content="Fire breath is hot", scanDepth=4

Chat: "I saw a dragon"
→ Entry A activates (matched "dragon")
→ Entry A content added to recurseBuffer
→ Recursion scan matches "fire breath" in recurseBuffer
→ Entry B activates
</code></pre>

<p>World Info books are stored as JSON files:</p>
<pre class="px-2 py-1.5 has-[code]:rounded-md has-[code]:!bg-[#e5e5e5] has-[div]:bg-transparent has-[div]:!p-0 has-[code]:text-stone-900 dark:has-[code]:!bg-[#242424] has-[code]:dark:text-white [&_code]:block [&_code]:border-none [&_code]:bg-transparent [&_code]:p-0"><code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">data/
  [user]/
    worlds/
      [book_name].json
</code></pre>
<p><strong>Book File Format:</strong></p>
<pre class="px-2 py-1.5 has-[code]:rounded-md has-[code]:!bg-[#e5e5e5] has-[div]:bg-transparent has-[div]:!p-0 has-[code]:text-stone-900 dark:has-[code]:!bg-[#242424] has-[code]:dark:text-white [&_code]:block [&_code]:border-none [&_code]:bg-transparent [&_code]:p-0"><pre class="not-prose m-0 w-full bg-transparent p-[6px_8px]"><code class="block" style="white-space: pre; font-size: 12px;"><div class="whitespace-pre"><span style="color:#24292E">{</span></div><div class="whitespace-pre"><span style="color:#005CC5">    "name"</span><span style="color:#24292E">: </span><span style="color:#032F62">"Book Name"</span><span style="color:#24292E">,</span></div><div class="whitespace-pre"><span style="color:#005CC5">    "entries"</span><span style="color:#24292E">: {</span></div><div class="whitespace-pre"><span style="color:#005CC5">        "0"</span><span style="color:#24292E">: { </span><span style="color:#005CC5">"uid"</span><span style="color:#24292E">: </span><span style="color:#005CC5">0</span><span style="color:#24292E">, </span><span style="color:#005CC5">"key"</span><span style="color:#24292E">: [</span><span style="color:#032F62">"keyword"</span><span style="color:#24292E">], </span><span style="color:#005CC5">"content"</span><span style="color:#24292E">: </span><span style="color:#032F62">"..."</span><span style="color:#24292E">, </span><span style="color:#B31D28;font-style:italic">...</span><span style="color:#24292E"> },</span></div><div class="whitespace-pre"><span style="color:#005CC5">        "1"</span><span style="color:#24292E">: { </span><span style="color:#005CC5">"uid"</span><span style="color:#24292E">: </span><span style="color:#005CC5">1</span><span style="color:#24292E">, </span><span style="color:#B31D28;font-style:italic">...</span><span style="color:#24292E"> }</span></div><div class="whitespace-pre"><span style="color:#24292E">    }</span></div><div class="whitespace-pre"><span style="color:#24292E">}</span></div></code></pre></pre>

<p>World Info books can be bound to characters via:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>Embedded</strong>: Book data stored directly in character card JSON (<code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">data.character_book</code>)</li>
<li><strong>Linked</strong>: Reference to external book file stored in character data</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Embedded Format Detection:</strong></p>

<h2 id="performance-considerations" class="group" data-header="true">Performance Considerations<button class="relative ml-2 cursor-pointer align-baseline text-gray-400 opacity-0 transition-opacity hover:text-blue-400 focus:opacity-100 group-hover:opacity-100" aria-label="Copy link to header"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="1em" height="1em" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 256 256" class="h-4 w-4"><path d="M117.18,188.74a12,12,0,0,1,0,17l-5.12,5.12A58.26,58.26,0,0,1,70.6,228h0A58.62,58.62,0,0,1,29.14,127.92L63.89,93.17a58.64,58.64,0,0,1,98.56,28.11,12,12,0,1,1-23.37,5.44,34.65,34.65,0,0,0-58.22-16.58L46.11,144.89A34.62,34.62,0,0,0,70.57,204h0a34.41,34.41,0,0,0,24.49-10.14l5.11-5.12A12,12,0,0,1,117.18,188.74ZM226.83,45.17a58.65,58.65,0,0,0-82.93,0l-5.11,5.11a12,12,0,0,0,17,17l5.12-5.12a34.63,34.63,0,1,1,49,49L175.1,145.86A34.39,34.39,0,0,1,150.61,156h0a34.63,34.63,0,0,1-33.69-26.72,12,12,0,0,0-23.38,5.44A58.64,58.64,0,0,0,150.56,180h.05a58.28,58.28,0,0,0,41.47-17.17l34.75-34.75a58.62,58.62,0,0,0,0-82.91Z"></path></svg></button></h2>
<h3 id="optimization-strategies" class="group" data-header="true">Optimization Strategies<button class="relative ml-2 cursor-pointer align-baseline text-gray-400 opacity-0 transition-opacity hover:text-blue-400 focus:opacity-100 group-hover:opacity-100" aria-label="Copy link to header"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="1em" height="1em" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 256 256" class="h-4 w-4"><path d="M117.18,188.74a12,12,0,0,1,0,17l-5.12,5.12A58.26,58.26,0,0,1,70.6,228h0A58.62,58.62,0,0,1,29.14,127.92L63.89,93.17a58.64,58.64,0,0,1,98.56,28.11,12,12,0,1,1-23.37,5.44,34.65,34.65,0,0,0-58.22-16.58L46.11,144.89A34.62,34.62,0,0,0,70.57,204h0a34.41,34.41,0,0,0,24.49-10.14l5.11-5.12A12,12,0,0,1,117.18,188.74ZM226.83,45.17a58.65,58.65,0,0,0-82.93,0l-5.11,5.11a12,12,0,0,0,17,17l5.12-5.12a34.63,34.63,0,1,1,49,49L175.1,145.86A34.39,34.39,0,0,1,150.61,156h0a34.63,34.63,0,0,1-33.69-26.72,12,12,0,0,0-23.38,5.44A58.64,58.64,0,0,0,150.56,180h.05a58.28,58.28,0,0,0,41.47-17.17l34.75-34.75a58.62,58.62,0,0,0,0-82.91Z"></path></svg></button></h3>
<ol>
<li><strong>Debounced Saves</strong>: 1000ms debounce prevents excessive disk writes</li>
<li><strong>Token Caching</strong>: Token counts cached per entry content hash</li>
<li><strong>Early Exit</strong>: Constant entries skip scanning entirely</li>
<li><strong>Budget Limits</strong>: Hard token cap prevents runaway activation</li>
<li><strong>Scan Depth Limits</strong>: <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">MAX_SCAN_DEPTH = 1000</code> prevents excessive iteration</li>
</ol>
<h3 id="token-budget-formula" class="group" data-header="true">Token Budget Formula<button class="relative ml-2 cursor-pointer align-baseline text-gray-400 opacity-0 transition-opacity hover:text-blue-400 focus:opacity-100 group-hover:opacity-100" aria-label="Copy link to header"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="1em" height="1em" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 256 256" class="h-4 w-4"><path d="M117.18,188.74a12,12,0,0,1,0,17l-5.12,5.12A58.26,58.26,0,0,1,70.6,228h0A58.62,58.62,0,0,1,29.14,127.92L63.89,93.17a58.64,58.64,0,0,1,98.56,28.11,12,12,0,1,1-23.37,5.44,34.65,34.65,0,0,0-58.22-16.58L46.11,144.89A34.62,34.62,0,0,0,70.57,204h0a34.41,34.41,0,0,0,24.49-10.14l5.11-5.12A12,12,0,0,1,117.18,188.74ZM226.83,45.17a58.65,58.65,0,0,0-82.93,0l-5.11,5.11a12,12,0,0,0,17,17l5.12-5.12a34.63,34.63,0,1,1,49,49L175.1,145.86A34.39,34.39,0,0,1,150.61,156h0a34.63,34.63,0,0,1-33.69-26.72,12,12,0,0,0-23.38,5.44A58.64,58.64,0,0,0,150.56,180h.05a58.28,58.28,0,0,0,41.47-17.17l34.75-34.75a58.62,58.62,0,0,0,0-82.91Z"></path></svg></button></h3>
<p>The budget calculation in <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">getWorldInfoPrompt()</code> implements the following logic:</p>
<pre class="px-2 py-1.5 has-[code]:rounded-md has-[code]:!bg-[#e5e5e5] has-[div]:bg-transparent has-[div]:!p-0 has-[code]:text-stone-900 dark:has-[code]:!bg-[#242424] has-[code]:dark:text-white [&_code]:block [&_code]:border-none [&_code]:bg-transparent [&_code]:p-0"><pre class="not-prose m-0 w-full bg-transparent p-[6px_8px]"><code class="block" style="white-space: pre; font-size: 12px;"><div class="whitespace-pre"><span style="color:#6A737D">// Calculate budget from maxContext parameter</span></div><div class="whitespace-pre"><span style="color:#D73A49">const</span><span style="color:#005CC5"> budgetPercent</span><span style="color:#D73A49"> =</span><span style="color:#24292E"> world_info_budget;  </span><span style="color:#6A737D">// Global setting [world-info.js:73]</span></div><div class="whitespace-pre"><span style="color:#D73A49">const</span><span style="color:#005CC5"> budgetCap</span><span style="color:#D73A49"> =</span><span style="color:#24292E"> world_info_budget_cap;  </span><span style="color:#6A737D">// Global setting [world-info.js:81]</span></div><div class="whitespace-pre"> </div><div class="whitespace-pre"><span style="color:#6A737D">// Available budget based on percentage</span></div><div class="whitespace-pre"><span style="color:#D73A49">const</span><span style="color:#005CC5"> availableBudget</span><span style="color:#D73A49"> =</span><span style="color:#24292E"> Math.</span><span style="color:#6F42C1">round</span><span style="color:#24292E">(maxContext </span><span style="color:#D73A49">*</span><span style="color:#24292E"> (budgetPercent </span><span style="color:#D73A49">/</span><span style="color:#005CC5"> 100</span><span style="color:#24292E">));</span></div><div class="whitespace-pre"> </div><div class="whitespace-pre"><span style="color:#6A737D">// Apply cap if configured (0 = unlimited)</span></div><div class="whitespace-pre"><span style="color:#D73A49">const</span><span style="color:#005CC5"> effectiveBudget</span><span style="color:#D73A49"> =</span><span style="color:#24292E"> budgetCap </span><span style="color:#D73A49">></span><span style="color:#005CC5"> 0</span><span style="color:#24292E"> </span></div><div class="whitespace-pre"><span style="color:#D73A49">    ?</span><span style="color:#24292E"> Math.</span><span style="color:#6F42C1">min</span><span style="color:#24292E">(availableBudget, budgetCap)</span></div><div class="whitespace-pre"><span style="color:#D73A49">    :</span><span style="color:#24292E"> availableBudget;</span></div><div class="whitespace-pre"> </div><div class="whitespace-pre"><span style="color:#6A737D">// Budget is consumed during allocation loop</span></div><div class="whitespace-pre"><span style="color:#6A737D">// Each entry: budget -= await getTokenCountAsync(entry.content)</span></div></code></pre></pre>
<p><strong>Budget Allocation Process:</strong></p>
<ol>
<li><strong>Sorting</strong>: Entries sorted by <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">weight</code> (desc), <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">order</code> (desc), <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">uid</code> (asc) - see <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">sortFn</code> at <a href="https://github.com/SillyTavern/SillyTavern/blob/e41bcf0c/world-info.js#L88-L88" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="mb-1 mr-1 inline-flex items-stretch font-mono text-xs !no-underline transition-opacity hover:opacity-75"><span class="flex items-center break-all rounded-l px-2 py-1.5 bg-[#e5e5e5] text-[#333333] dark:bg-[#252525] dark:text-[#e4e4e4]"><svg class="mr-1.5 hidden h-3.5 w-3.5 flex-shrink-0 opacity-40 md:block" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 0c-6.626 0-12 5.373-12 12 0 5.302 3.438 9.8 8.207 11.387.599.111.793-.261.793-.577v-2.234c-3.338.726-4.033-1.416-4.033-1.416-.546-1.387-1.333-1.756-1.333-1.756-1.089-.745.083-.729.083-.729 1.205.084 1.839 1.237 1.839 1.237 1.07 1.834 2.807 1.304 3.492.997.107-.775.418-1.305.762-1.604-2.665-.305-5.467-1.334-5.467-5.931 0-1.311.469-2.381 1.236-3.221-.124-.303-.535-1.524.117-3.176 0 0 1.008-.322 3.301 1.23.957-.266 1.983-.399 3.003-.404 1.02.005 2.047.138 3.006.404 2.291-1.552 3.297-1.23 3.297-1.23.653 1.653.242 2.874.118 3.176.77.84 1.235 1.911 1.235 3.221 0 4.609-2.807 5.624-5.479 5.921.43.372.823 1.102.823 2.222v3.293c0 .319.192.694.801.576 4.765-1.589 8.199-6.086 8.199-11.386 0-6.627-5.373-12-12-12z"></path></svg>world-info.js</span><span class="flex flex-shrink-0 items-center rounded-r border-l px-2 py-1.5 border-[#dddddd] bg-[#d8d8d8] text-[#666666] dark:border-[#333333] dark:bg-[#2a2a2a] dark:text-[#888888]">88</span></a></li>
<li><strong>Token Counting</strong>: Each entry's content tokenized via <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">getTokenCountAsync(content)</code> from <a href="https://github.com/SillyTavern/SillyTavern/blob/e41bcf0c/tokenizers.js" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="mb-1 mr-1 inline-flex items-stretch font-mono text-xs !no-underline transition-opacity hover:opacity-75"><span class="flex items-center break-all rounded-l px-2 py-1.5 bg-[#e5e5e5] text-[#333333] dark:bg-[#252525] dark:text-[#e4e4e4] rounded-r"><svg class="mr-1.5 hidden h-3.5 w-3.5 flex-shrink-0 opacity-40 md:block" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 0c-6.626 0-12 5.373-12 12 0 5.302 3.438 9.8 8.207 11.387.599.111.793-.261.793-.577v-2.234c-3.338.726-4.033-1.416-4.033-1.416-.546-1.387-1.333-1.756-1.333-1.756-1.089-.745.083-.729.083-.729 1.205.084 1.839 1.237 1.839 1.237 1.07 1.834 2.807 1.304 3.492.997.107-.775.418-1.305.762-1.604-2.665-.305-5.467-1.334-5.467-5.931 0-1.311.469-2.381 1.236-3.221-.124-.303-.535-1.524.117-3.176 0 0 1.008-.322 3.301 1.23.957-.266 1.983-.399 3.003-.404 1.02.005 2.047.138 3.006.404 2.291-1.552 3.297-1.23 3.297-1.23.653 1.653.242 2.874.118 3.176.77.84 1.235 1.911 1.235 3.221 0 4.609-2.807 5.624-5.479 5.921.43.372.823 1.102.823 2.222v3.293c0 .319.192.694.801.576 4.765-1.589 8.199-6.086 8.199-11.386 0-6.627-5.373-12-12-12z"></path></svg>tokenizers.js</span></a></li>
<li><strong>Budget Tracking</strong>: Running budget decremented for each included entry</li>
<li><strong>Cutoff</strong>: Allocation stops when <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">budget < entry_tokens</code> unless <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">world_info_min_activations</code> forces more scanning</li>
</ol>

<li><code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">world_info_budget_cap</code> <a href="https://github.com/SillyTavern/SillyTavern/blob/e41bcf0c/world-info.js#L81-L81" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="mb-1 mr-1 inline-flex items-stretch font-mono text-xs !no-underline transition-opacity hover:opacity-75"><span class="flex items-center break-all rounded-l px-2 py-1.5 bg-[#e5e5e5] text-[#333333] dark:bg-[#252525] dark:text-[#e4e4e4]"><svg class="mr-1.5 hidden h-3.5 w-3.5 flex-shrink-0 opacity-40 md:block" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 0c-6.626 0-12 5.373-12 12 0 5.302 3.438 9.8 8.207 11.387.599.111.793-.261.793-.577v-2.234c-3.338.726-4.033-1.416-4.033-1.416-.546-1.387-1.333-1.756-1.333-1.756-1.089-.745.083-.729.083-.729 1.205.084 1.839 1.237 1.839 1.237 1.07 1.834 2.807 1.304 3.492.997.107-.775.418-1.305.762-1.604-2.665-.305-5.467-1.334-5.467-5.931 0-1.311.469-2.381 1.236-3.221-.124-.303-.535-1.524.117-3.176 0 0 1.008-.322 3.301 1.23.957-.266 1.983-.399 3.003-.404 1.02.005 2.047.138 3.006.404 2.291-1.552 3.297-1.23 3.297-1.23.653 1.653.242 2.874.118 3.176.77.84 1.235 1.911 1.235 3.221 0 4.609-2.807 5.624-5.479 5.921.43.372.823 1.102.823 2.222v3.293c0 .319.192.694.801.576 4.765-1.589 8.199-6.086 8.199-11.386 0-6.627-5.373-12-12-12z"></path></svg>world-info.js</span><span class="flex flex-shrink-0 items-center rounded-r border-l px-2 py-1.5 border-[#dddddd] bg-[#d8d8d8] text-[#666666] dark:border-[#333333] dark:bg-[#2a2a2a] dark:text-[#888888]">81</span></a> - Default: 0 (no cap)</li>

<p><strong>External Activation API</strong></p>
<p>Extensions can force-activate entries via the static <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">WorldInfoBuffer.externalActivations</code> Map:</p>
<pre class="px-2 py-1.5 has-[code]:rounded-md has-[code]:!bg-[#e5e5e5] has-[div]:bg-transparent has-[div]:!p-0 has-[code]:text-stone-900 dark:has-[code]:!bg-[#242424] has-[code]:dark:text-white <p><strong>Integration with Slash Commands:</strong></p>
<p>The <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">/wi-activate</code> and <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">/wi-deactivate</code> commands use this API:</p>
<ul>
<li><code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">/wi-activate</code> adds to <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">externalActivations</code> Map</li>
<li><code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">/wi-deactivate</code> removes from <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">externalActivations</code> Map</li>
<li>Entries remain force-activated until explicitly deactivated or buffer reset</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Event Emission:</strong></p>
<p>After activation, <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">eventSource.emit(event_types.WORLD_INFO_ACTIVATED, { entries, scan })</code> is called, allowing extensions to react to WI changes.</p>

<hr>
<p><strong>Key Takeaways:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>The <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">WorldInfoBuffer</code> class manages all scanning and matching operations</li>
<li>Entries are activated based on keyword matches using configurable logic operators</li>
<li>Budget allocation prioritizes entries by weight and enforces token limits</li>
<li>Multiple insertion positions allow fine control over prompt structure</li>
<li>Recursive scanning enables cascading activation of related entries</li>
<li>The system integrates tightly with the chat generation pipeline via <code class="rounded-sm bg-[#e5e5e5] px-[0.25rem] py-[0.20rem] text-xs font-normal leading-[15px] before:hidden after:hidden dark:bg-[#484848]/30">getWorldInfoPrompt()</code></li>
</ul>
<p>For details on advanced features like sticky entries, cooldowns, and automation, see <a href="/SillyTavern/SillyTavern/6.2-chat-summarization-extension" class="text-neutral-300 hover:text-neutral-200 hover:underline">World Info Advanced Features</a>.</p></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="hidden overflow-hidden transition-[border-radius] xl:sticky xl:right-0 xl:top-20 xl:block xl:h-[calc(100vh-82px)] xl:w-64 xl:flex-shrink-0 2xl:w-72" style="scrollbar-width:none"><div class="flex max-h-full w-full flex-shrink-0 flex-col py-6 pt-0 text-sm lg:pb-4 lg:pt-8 xl:w-64 2xl:w-72" style="scrollbar-color:var(--color-night) transparent"><div><div class="text-text-secondary relative mx-4 my-4 rounded-md border border-neutral-200 bg-neutral-100 p-3 text-sm dark:border-neutral-800 dark:bg-neutral-900 dark:text-neutral-400"><button class="absolute right-2 top-2 rounded-sm p-1 opacity-70 transition-opacity hover:opacity-100 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-neutral-400 focus:ring-offset-2"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="1em" height="1em" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 256 256" class="h-4 w-4"><path d="M205.66,194.34a8,8,0,0,1-11.32,11.32L128,139.31,61.66,205.66a8,8,0,0,1-11.32-11.32L116.69,128,50.34,61.66A8,8,0,0,1,61.66,50.34L128,116.69l66.34-66.35a8,8,0,0,1,11.32,11.32L139.31,128Z"></path></svg><span class="sr-only">Dismiss</span></button><p class="text-sm font-medium">Refresh this wiki</p><p class="mt-2 text-sm font-light text-neutral-500 dark:text-neutral-400">This wiki was recently refreshed. [src/util.js](src/util.js)\n\n\u003c/details\u003e\n\n\n\n## Purpose and Scope\n\nThis document provides a high-level overview of the SillyTavern architecture, explaining its purpose as a web-based chat interface for Large Language Models (LLMs) and describing how its major components interact. It covers the client-server architecture, initialization flow, data storage patterns, and API integration layer.\n\nFor detailed information about specific subsystems, refer to:\n- Installation and configuration: [Installation and Setup](#1.1)\n- Backend server architecture: [Server Architecture and Routing](#2.2)\n- LLM provider integration: [AI Integration](#3)\n- Frontend components: [User Interface](#4)\n- Data persistence: [Data Management](#5)\n\n---\n\n## What is SillyTavern?\n\nSillyTavern is a browser-based chat interface application designed for conversational AI interactions. It provides a sophisticated UI for chatting with AI characters backed by 30+ different Large Language Model providers (OpenAI, Claude, local models, etc.). The system supports complex features including:\n\n- **Character Management**: Creation and storage of AI character cards with embedded personality data\n- **Multi-Provider Support**: Unified interface for OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, Google AI, local models (KoboldAI, llama.cpp, Oobaboga), and many others\n- **Context Management**: World Info system for injecting contextual knowledge into conversations\n- **Group Chats**: Multi-character conversations with sophisticated turn management\n- **Extension System**: Modular architecture supporting image generation, expressions, quick replies, and custom functionality\n- **Multi-User Support**: Optional user accounts with per-user data isolation\n\n---\n\n## System Architecture Overview\n\nSillyTavern follows a client-server architecture where a Node.js backend serves a single-page application and proxies requests to external AI services.\n\n### High-Level Component Diagram\n\n```mermaid\ngraph TB\n    subgraph Browser[\"Browser (Client)\"]\n        index[\"index.html\"]\n        script[\"script.js\u003cbr/\u003efirstLoadInit()\u003cbr/\u003eGenerate()\"]\n        \n        subgraph ClientCore[\"Core Modules\"]\n            worldInfo[\"world-info.js\u003cbr/\u003eWorldInfoBuffer\"]\n            powerUser[\"power-user.js\u003cbr/\u003epower_user settings\"]\n            groupChats[\"group-chats.js\u003cbr/\u003egroups array\"]\n            tags[\"tags.js\u003cbr/\u003etag_map\"]\n        end\n        \n        subgraph AILayer[\"AI Integration\"]\n            openai[\"openai.js\u003cbr/\u003esendOpenAIRequest()\u003cbr/\u003esetOpenAIMessages()\"]\n            textgen[\"textgen-settings.js\u003cbr/\u003egenerateTextGenWithStreaming()\"]\n            promptMgr[\"PromptManager.js\u003cbr/\u003esetupChatCompletionPromptManager()\"]\n        end\n        \n        subgraph ExtSys[\"Extension System\"]\n            extensions[\"extensions.js\u003cbr/\u003eloadExtensionSettings()\u003cbr/\u003egetContext()\"]\n            slashCmd[\"SlashCommandParser\u003cbr/\u003eaddCommand()\"]\n        end\n    end\n    \n    subgraph Server[\"Node.js Server\"]\n        serverJS[\"server.js\u003cbr/\u003eprocess.chdir()\"]\n        serverMain[\"src/server-main.js\u003cbr/\u003eExpress app setup\"]\n        \n        subgraph Endpoints[\"Endpoint Routers\"]\n            charEP[\"src/endpoints/characters.js\u003cbr/\u003e/api/characters/*\"]\n            chatEP[\"src/endpoints/chats.js\u003cbr/\u003e/api/chats/*\"]\n            settingsEP[\"src/endpoints/settings.js\u003cbr/\u003e/api/settings/*\"]\n            groupsEP[\"src/endpoints/groups.js\u003cbr/\u003e/api/groups/*\"]\n        end\n        \n        subgraph Storage[\"File System\"]\n            dataRoot[\"DATA_ROOT/\u003cbr/\u003echaracters/, chats/\u003cbr/\u003egroups/, worlds/\"]\n            cache[\"_cache/characters/\u003cbr/\u003eDiskCache\"]\n        end\n    end\n    \n    subgraph External[\"External APIs\"]\n        llms[\"LLM Providers\u003cbr/\u003eapi.openai.com\u003cbr/\u003eapi.anthropic.com\"]\n    end\n    \n    index --\u003e script\n    script --\u003e ClientCore\n    script --\u003e AILayer\n    script --\u003e ExtSys\n    \n    openai --\u003e|\"POST /api/backends/chat-completions\"| serverMain\n    textgen --\u003e|\"POST /api/backends/text-completions\"| serverMain\n    \n    serverJS --\u003e serverMain\n    serverMain --\u003e Endpoints\n    Endpoints --\u003e Storage\n    charEP -.readCharacterData().-\u003e cache\n    \n    serverMain --\u003e|HTTP Proxy| llms\n```\n\n**Key Architectural Patterns**:\n\n- **Single-Page Application**: All UI logic executes in `script.js` which imports and orchestrates ~50 module files\n- **Server as Proxy**: The Node.js backend primarily serves files and proxies/transforms requests to external LLM APIs  \n- **File-Based Persistence**: No database; all data stored as JSON/JSONL/PNG files in `DATA_ROOT`\n- **Cache Layers**: `memoryCache` (MemoryLimitedMap) and `diskCache` (node-persist) reduce character card parse overhead\n\n**Sources**: [public/script.js:1-100](), [server.js:1-18](), [src/server-main.js](), [src/endpoints/characters.js:38-157](), Diagram 1 from provided overview\n\n---\n\n## Application Initialization Flow\n\n### Server Startup Sequence\n\n```mermaid\nsequenceDiagram\n    participant CLI as Command Line\n    participant ServerJS as server.js\n    participant Config as config.yaml\n    participant ServerMain as server-main.js\n    participant Express as Express App\n    participant Storage as File System\n    \n    CLI-\u003e\u003eServerJS: node server.js [args]\n    ServerJS-\u003e\u003eServerJS: CommandLineParser.parse()\n    ServerJS-\u003e\u003eConfig: Load config.yaml\n    Note over ServerJS,Config: Set DATA_ROOT from --dataRoot\n    ServerJS-\u003e\u003eServerMain: import server-main.js\n    \n    ServerMain-\u003e\u003eConfig: getConfig()\n    ServerMain-\u003e\u003eExpress: Initialize Express app\n    ServerMain-\u003e\u003eExpress: Apply middleware stack\n    Note over Express: Whitelist, BasicAuth,\u003cbr/\u003eCSRF, CORS\n    ServerMain-\u003e\u003eExpress: Mount API routers\n    Note over Express: /api/characters/*\u003cbr/\u003e/api/chats/*\u003cbr/\u003e/api/settings/*\n    \n    ServerMain-\u003e\u003eStorage: Check/create user directories\n    ServerMain-\u003e\u003eStorage: Seed default content\n    ServerMain-\u003e\u003eExpress: Listen on port\n    Express--\u003e\u003eCLI: Server ready\n```\n\nThe server starts from [server.js:1-18](), which:\n1. Parses command-line arguments using `CommandLineParser`\n2. Sets global `DATA_ROOT` from `--dataRoot` argument\n3. Changes working directory to `serverDirectory`\n4. Imports and executes [src/server-main.js]()\n\n**Key Configuration**: [default/config.yaml:1-227]() defines all server settings including:\n- `dataRoot`: Base directory for user data (default: `./data`)\n- `port`: HTTP server port (default: `8000`)\n- `listen`: Whether to bind to network interfaces or only localhost\n- `enableUserAccounts`: Multi-user mode flag\n- `whitelistMode`: IP-based access control\n- `basicAuthMode`: HTTP Basic Authentication\n\n**Sources**: [server.js:1-18](), [default/config.yaml:1-227](), [src/util.js:55-79]()\n\n---\n\n### Client Initialization Flow\n\n```mermaid\nsequenceDiagram\n    participant Browser\n    participant index[\"index.html\"]\n    participant firstLoadInit[\"script.js\u003cbr/\u003efirstLoadInit()\"]\n    participant Server\n    participant eventSource[\"eventSource\"]\n    \n    Browser-\u003e\u003eindex: Load page\n    index-\u003e\u003efirstLoadInit: await DOMContentLoaded\n    \n    firstLoadInit-\u003e\u003eServer: fetch('/csrf-token')\n    Server--\u003e\u003efirstLoadInit: { token }\n    Note over firstLoadInit: token stored globally\n    \n    firstLoadInit-\u003e\u003efirstLoadInit: showLoader()\n    firstLoadInit-\u003e\u003efirstLoadInit: registerPromptManagerMigration()\n    firstLoadInit-\u003e\u003efirstLoadInit: initDomHandlers()\n firstLoadInit-\u003e\u003eServer: initSecrets()\u003cbr/\u003ereadSecretState()\n    firstLoadInit-\u003e\u003efirstLoadInit: initLocales()\n    Note over firstLoadInit: Loads i18n translations\n    \n    firstLoadInit-\u003e\u003efirstLoadInit: initDefaultSlashCommands()\n    firstLoadInit-\u003e\u003efirstLoadInit: initOpenAI()\u003cbr/\u003einitTextGenSettings()\u003cbr/\u003einitKoboldSettings()\n    \n    firstLoadInit-\u003e\u003eServer: initPresetManager()\n    firstLoadInit-\u003e\u003eServer: initSystemMessages()\n    firstLoadInit-\u003e\u003eServer: getSettings()\n    Note over firstLoadInit: Populates settings global\n    \n    firstLoadInit-\u003e\u003efirstLoadInit: initKeyboard()\u003cbr/\u003einitDynamicStyles()\n    firstLoadInit-\u003e\u003efirstLoadInit: initTags()\u003cbr/\u003einitBookmarks()\n    \n    firstLoadInit-\u003e\u003eServer: getUserAvatars(true, user_avatar)\n    firstLoadInit-\u003e\u003eServer: getCharacters()\n    Note over firstLoadInit: Populates characters array\n    firstLoadInit-\u003e\u003eServer: getBackgrounds()\n    \n    firstLoadInit-\u003e\u003efirstLoadInit: initTokenizers()\n    firstLoadInit-\u003e\u003efirstLoadInit: initExtensions()\n    Note over firstLoadInit: Calls init() on all extensions\n    \n    firstLoadInit-\u003e\u003efirstLoadInit: initReasoning()\u003cbr/\u003einitWelcomeScreen()\n    \n    firstLoadInit-\u003e\u003eeventSource: emit(APP_INITIALIZED)\n    firstLoadInit-\u003e\u003efirstLoadInit: hideLoader()\n    firstLoadInit-\u003e\u003eeventSource: emit(APP_READY)\n```\n\nThe `firstLoadInit()` function at [public/script.js:666-739]() executes initialization in strict dependency order:\n\n1. **CSRF Token**: Fetched first to enable authenticated API calls\n2. **Core Systems**: DOM handlers, Markdown converter, keyboard navigation, localization\n3. **Command System**: `SlashCommandParser` populated via `initDefaultSlashCommands()`\n4. **AI Integrations**: Initialize API modules (`initOpenAI()`, `initTextGenSettings()`, etc.)\n5. **Persistent Data**: Load `settings`, `characters`, `personas`, `backgrounds` from server\n6. **Tokenizers**: Load tokenizer models for context management\n7. **Extensions**: Call `init()` on each extension in `public/scripts/extensions/`\n8. **Events**: Fire `event_types.APP_INITIALIZED` then `event_types.APP_READY`\n\n**Module Loading**: The entry point uses ES6 imports to load dependencies:\n```javascript\nimport { initOpenAI } from './scripts/openai.js';\nimport { initExtensions } from './scripts/extensions.js';\n```\n\n**Sources**: [public/script.js:666-739](), [public/script.js:1-288](), [public/index.html:1-50]()\n\n---\n\n## Data Storage Architecture\n\n### Directory Structure\n\n```\nDATA_ROOT/\n├── _cache/\n│   └── characters/           # node-persist cache (DiskCache.DIRECTORY)\n├── default-user/             # Default user (single-user mode)\n│   ├── characters/           # Character card PNGs with embedded JSON\n│   ├── chats/                # Chat JSONL files organized by character\n│   │   └── {character}/      # One directory per character\n│   ├── groups/               # Group metadata JSON files\n│   ├── group chats/          # Group chat JSONL files\n│   ├── worlds/               # World Info JSON files\n│   ├── User Avatars/         # Persona avatar images\n│   ├── backgrounds/          # Background images\n│   ├── settings.json         # User settings (extension_settings, power_user, etc.)\n│   ├── secrets.json          # Encrypted API keys\n│   └── backups/\n│       ├── chat_backups/     # Timestamped chat snapshots\n│       └── settings_backups/ # Timestamped settings snapshots\n└── {user-handle}/            # Per-user directories (multi-user mode)\n    └── (same structure)\n```\n\n**Multi-User Isolation**: The `getUserDirectories(handle)` function at [src/users.js:131-186]() returns a `UserDirectoryList` object with paths for a specific user:\n\n```javascript\n{\n  root: '/path/to/DATA_ROOT/user-handle',\n  characters: '/path/to/DATA_ROOT/user-handle/characters',\n  chats: '/path/to/DATA_ROOT/user-handle/chats',\n  groups: '/path/to/DATA_ROOT/user-handle/groups',\n  // ... etc\n}\n```\n\n### Character Card Format\n\nCharacters are stored as PNG images with JSON embedded in `tEXt` chunks:\n\n| Format | Chunk Name | Parser Function | Location |\n|--------|------------|-----------------|----------|\n| TavernAI V2 | `chara` | `parse(inputFile, 'png')` | [src/character-card-parser.js:35-80]() |\n| Legacy | `tEXt` | `extractDataFromPng()` | [src/character-card-parser.js:85-120]() |\n\nThe `readCharacterData()` function at [src/endpoints/characters.js:176-209]() uses a two-tier cache:\n\n1. **Memory Cache**: `MemoryLimitedMap` with 100MB default limit (configurable)\n2. **Disk Cache**: `node-persist` storage in `_cache/characters/` (keyed by file path + mtime)\n\n### Chat Storage Format\n\nChats use JSONL (newline-delimited JSON) where:\n- **Line 1**: Header object with `chat_metadata` field\n- **Lines 2+**: Individual message objects\n\nExample chat file structure:\n```jsonl\n{\"chat_metadata\":{\"note_prompt\":\"\",\"note_interval\":10}}\n{\"name\":\"User\",\"is_user\":true,\"mes\":\"Hello\",\"send_date\":1234567890}\n{\"name\":\"Character\",\"is_user\":false,\"mes\":\"Hi there!\",\"send_date\":1234567891}\n```\n\n**Backup Strategy**: The `backupChat()` function at [src/endpoints/chats.js:40-60]() uses `_.throttle()` with 10-second intervals (configurable via `backups.chat.throttleInterval`) to prevent excessive disk writes.\n\n**Sources**: [src/users.js:131-186](), [src/endpoints/characters.js:38-209](), [src/character-card-parser.js:1-150](), [src/endpoints/chats.js:1-100](), Diagram 3 from provided overview\n\n---\n\n## Client-Server Communication\n\n### API Endpoint Organization\n\nThe Express server exposes RESTful endpoints organized by domain:\n\n| Router | Path Prefix | Source File | Purpose |\n|--------|-------------|-------------|---------|\n| Characters | `/api/characters/*` | [src/endpoints/characters.js]() | Character CRUD, import/export |\n| Chats | `/api/chats/*` | [src/endpoints/chats.js]() | Chat logs, save/load, import |\n| Settings | `/api/settings/*` | [src/endpoints/settings.js]() | User settings persistence |\n| Groups | `/api/groups/*` | [src/endpoints/groups.js]() | Group management |\n| Secrets | `/api/secrets/*` | [src/endpoints/secrets.js]() | API key storage |\n| Presets | `/api/presets/*` | [src/endpoints/presets.js]() | Sampling preset management |\n| Content | `/api/content/*` | [src/endpoints/content-manager.js]() | Default content seeding |\n\n**Request Headers**: All API calls include CSRF protection via the `X-CSRF-Token` header, set by `getRequestHeaders()` at [public/script.js:619-630]().\n\n**Authentication Flow**: \n1. **IP Whitelist**: [src/middleware/whitelist.js:1-100]() checks client IP against configured whitelist\n2. **Basic Auth** (optional): [src/middleware/basicAuth.js:13-45]() validates HTTP Basic Authentication\n3. **User Session** (multi-user): Extracts user handle from session cookie\n4. **CSRF Validation**: Verifies token matches server-side secret\n\n**Sources**: [public/script.js:619-630](), [src/middleware/whitelist.js:1-100](), [src/middleware/basicAuth.js:1-60]()\n\n---\n\n## AI Request Pipeline\n\n### End-to-End Generation Flow\n\n```mermaid\nsequenceDiagram\n    participant User\n eventSource.emit(CHARACTER_MESSAGE_RENDERED)\n```\n\n### Prompt Assembly Components\n\nThe `setupChatCompletionPromptManager()` function at [public/scripts/openai.js:2800-3000]() assembles prompts in this order:\n\n1. **System Prompts**: From `sysprompt` settings\n2. **Character Card**: `description`, `personality`, `scenario` fields  \n3. **Story String**: Evaluated from context template (e.g., `power_user.context.story_string`)\n4. **World Info**: Injected at configured depths via `world_info.js:getWorldInfoPrompt()`\n5. **Example Messages**: `mes_example` from character card\n6. **Chat History**: Recent messages within token budget\n7. **Extension Prompts**: From `extension_prompts` map (keyed by extension name)\n\n### World Info Activation Logic\n\nThe `WorldInfoBuffer` class at [public/scripts/world-info.js:199-475]() implements keyword matching:\n\n| Logic Type | Enum | Activation Rule |\n|------------|------|----------------|\n| AND ANY | `world_info_logic.AND_ANY` | Primary keys matched AND at least one secondary |\n| AND ALL | `world_info_logic.AND_ALL` | Primary keys matched AND all secondary keys matched |\n| NOT ANY | `world_info_logic.NOT_ANY` | Primary keys matched AND no secondary keys matched |\n| NOT ALL | `world_info_logic.NOT_ALL` | Primary keys matched AND not all secondary keys matched |\n\n**Scan Depth**: Controlled by `world_info_depth` setting. The buffer scans the most recent N messages plus optional global scan data (persona description, character notes, etc.).\n\n**Sources**: [public/scripts/openai.js:2800-3100](), [public/scripts/world-info.js:199-475](), [public/script.js:2000-2200](), Diagram 2 from provided overview\n\n---\n\n## Configuration and Deployment\n\n### Configuration System\n\nSillyTavern uses a hierarchical configuration system:\n\n1. **config.yaml**: Primary configuration file loaded by [src/util.js:55-79]()\n2. **Environment Variables**: Override config values using `SILLYTAVERN_*` prefix (see `keyToEnv()` at [src/util.js:38]())\n3. **Command-Line Arguments**: Override at runtime via `--dataRoot`, `--port`, etc.\n\n**Configuration Access**: The `getConfigValue(key, defaultValue, typeConverter)` function at [src/util.js:88-109]() provides type-safe access:\n\n```javascript\nconst port = getConfigValue('port', 8000, 'number');\nconst enableAccounts = getConfigValue('enableUserAccounts', false, 'boolean');\n```\n\n**Critical Configuration Keys**:\n- `dataRoot`: Base directory for all user data\n- `listen`: Enable network access (default: false for localhost only)\n- `whitelistMode`: Restrict access by IP address\n- `enableUserAccounts`: Enable multi-user mode with login system\n- `ssl.enabled`: Enable HTTPS with certificate paths\n- `requestProxy.enabled`: Route LLM requests through proxy\n\n**Sources**: [src/util.js:29-120](), [default/config.yaml:1-227](), [src/command-line.js]()\n\n---\n\n## Security Architecture\n\n### Multi-Layer Security Model\n\n```mermaid\ngraph TB\n    Request[\"HTTP Request\"]\n    \n    subgraph \"Layer 1: Network Access Control\"\n        Whitelist[\"IP Whitelist\u003cbr/\u003ewhitelist.js\"]\n        HostCheck[\"Host Header Validation\u003cbr/\u003ehostWhitelist\"]\n    end\n    \n    subgraph \"Layer 2: Authentication\"\n        BasicAuth[\"HTTP Basic Auth\u003cbr/\u003ebasicAuth.js\"]\n        Session[\"User Session\u003cbr/\u003euser handle extraction\"]\n    end\n    \n    subgraph \"Layer 3: Request Validation\"\n        CSRF[\"CSRF Token Validation\u003cbr/\u003eX-CSRF-Token header\"]\n        PathValidation[\"Path Validation\u003cbr/\u003esanitize filenames\"]\n    end\n    \n    subgraph \"Layer 4: Authorization\"\n        UserDirs[\"User Directory Isolation\u003cbr/\u003egetUserDirectories()\"]\n        AdminCheck[\"Admin Privileges Check\"]\n    end\n    \n    Request --\u003e Whitelist\n    Request --\u003e HostCheck\n    Whitelist --\u003e BasicAuth\n    HostCheck --\u003e BasicAuth\n    BasicAuth --\u003e Session\n    Session --\u003e CSRF\n    CSRF --\u003e PathValidation\n    PathValidation --\u003e UserDirs\n    PathValidation --\u003e AdminCheck\n```\n\n**Middleware Stack Order** (in [src/server-main.js]()):\n1. **IP Whitelist**: Reject requests from non-whitelisted IPs\n2. **Basic Auth**: Validate username/password if enabled\n3. **User Session**: Extract user handle from cookie\n4. **CSRF Protection**: Validate token on state-changing operations\n5. **Path Sanitization**: Prevent directory traversal attacks\n\n**User Isolation**: When `enableUserAccounts: true`, the `getUserDirectories()` function at [src/users.js:131-186]() returns paths scoped to the authenticated user's handle, preventing cross-user data access.\n\n**Secret Storage**: API keys are stored in `secrets.json` with optional encryption. The `SecretManager` in [src/endpoints/secrets.js]() provides secure read/write access.\n\n**Sources**: [src/middleware/whitelist.js:1-100](), [src/middleware/basicAuth.js:1-60](), [src/users.js:131-186]()\n\n---\n\n## Extension System Architecture\n\n### Extension Lifecycle and Integration Points\n\n```mermaid\ngraph TB\n    subgraph
