SillyTavern UI is a single-page application built with jQuery and vanilla JavaScript. The interface centers around `#sheld` (the main container), `#chat` (message display), and drawer-based side panels for configuration and entity management.\n\nRelated pages: [Event System and Module Communication](2.3) for UI update mechanisms, [Chat Storage and Persistence](5.2) for message data, [Extension Framework](8) for extension UI integration.\n\n---\n\n## UI Architecture Overview\n\nThe UI is organized around a fixed viewport with absolute positioning. All interactive elements are managed through event delegation on the `eventSource` object.\n\n**DOM Structure and Key Elements**\n\n```mermaid\ngraph TB\n    body[\"document.body\"]\n    \n    body --\u003e preloader[\"#preloader\"]\n    body --\u003e bg1[\"#bg1\u003cbr/\u003ebackground-image layer\u003cbr/\u003ez-index: -1\"]\n    body --\u003e topBar[\"#top-bar\u003cbr/\u003ez-index: 3005\"]\n    body --\u003e topSettings[\"#top-settings-holder\u003cbr/\u003edrawer containers\"]\n    body --\u003e sheld[\"#sheld\u003cbr/\u003emain chat container\"]\n    \n    topBar --\u003e versionDisplay[\"#version_display\"]\n    topBar --\u003e userControls[\"user control buttons\"]\n    \n    topSettings --\u003e leftDrawer[\"#ai-config-button.drawer\"]\n    topSettings --\u003e rightDrawer[\"right menu drawers\"]\n    \n    leftDrawer --\u003e leftNavPanel[\"#left-nav-panel\u003cbr/\u003eAI config settings\"]\n    rightDrawer --\u003e rmPrintBlock[\"#rm_print_characters_block\u003cbr/\u003echaracter cards\"]\n    rightDrawer --\u003e characterPopup[\"#character_popup\u003cbr/\u003echaracter editor\"]\n    rightDrawer --\u003e rmGroupChats[\"#rm_group_chats_block\u003cbr/\u003egroup editor\"]\n    \n    sheld --\u003e chat[\"#chat\u003cbr/\u003emessage list\u003cbr/\u003eoverflow-y: scroll\"]\n    sheld --\u003e formSheld[\"#form_sheld\"]\n    \n    formSheld --\u003e sendForm[\"#send_form\u003cbr/\u003einput controls\"]\n    sendForm --\u003e sendTextarea[\"#send_textarea\u003cbr/\u003emessage input\"]\n    sendForm --\u003e leftSendForm[\"#leftSendForm\u003cbr/\u003eleft buttons\"]\n    sendForm --\u003e rightSendForm[\"#rightSendForm\u003cbr/\u003eright buttons\"]\n    \n    body --\u003e worldPopup[\"#world_popup\u003cbr/\u003eWorld Info editor\u003cbr/\u003ez-index: 3010\"]\n    body --\u003e dialogues[\"#dialogue_popup\u003cbr/\u003emodal dialogs\"]\n    \n    chat --\u003e mesTemplate[\".mes elements\u003cbr/\u003egenerated from #message_template\"]\n```\n\nSources: [public/index.html:51-66](), [public/style.css:752-900](), [public/script.js:418-420]()\n\n---\n\n## Layout System\n\n### Core Layout Structure\n\nThe `#sheld` container is positioned absolutely and sized to fill the viewport minus the top bar. Layout dimensions are controlled via CSS custom properties defined in `:root`.\n\n**CSS Custom Properties**\n\n| Variable | Purpose | Calculation | Source Setting |\n|----------|---------|-------------|----------------|\n| `--sheldWidth` | `#sheld` width | `50vw` (default) | `power_user.chat_width` |\n| `--topBarBlockSize` | `#top-bar` height | `--topBarIconSize + --topBarBlockPadding` | Fixed |\n| `--bottomFormBlockSize` | `#send_form` height | `--bottomFormIconSize + --bottomFormBlockPadding` | Fixed |\n| `--mainFontSize` | Base font size | `var(--fontScale) * 15px` | `power_user.font_scale` |\n| `--animation-duration` | Animation speed | `125ms` (default) | `animation_duration` variable |\n| `--SmartThemeBlurStrength` | Backdrop blur | `var(--blurStrength) * 1px` | `power_user.blur_strength` |\n\n**Layout Positioning**\n\n```css\n#sheld {\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    height: calc(100vh - var(--topBarBlockSize) - 1px);\n    position: absolute;\n    left: calc((100vw - var(--sheldWidth))/2);\n    top: var(--topBarBlockSize);\n    width: var(--sheldWidth);\n}\n\n#chat {\n    overflow-y: scroll;\n    flex-grow: 1;  /* Takes remaining space */\n}\n\n#send_form {\n    display: flex;\n    flex-wrap: wrap;\n    border-radius: 0 0 10px 10px;\n}\n```\n\nSources: [public/style.css:19-132](), [public/style.css:768-788](), [public/style.css:876-900]()\n\n### Drawer System\n\nDrawers slide over the main chat area and are controlled by the `.drawer` class with states managed via `.openDrawer` and `.closedDrawer` classes.\n\n**Drawer State Management**\n\n```mermaid\nstateDiagram-v2\n    [*] --\u003e Closed: Initial State\n    Closed --\u003e Opening: User clicks drawer icon\n    Opening --\u003e Open: Animation completes\n    Open --\u003e Closing: User clicks icon/outside\n    Closing --\u003e Closed: Animation completes\n    \n    Open --\u003e Pinned: User clicks pin button\n    Pinned --\u003e Open: User unpins\n    \n    note right of Pinned\n        Pinned drawers stay open\n        even when clicking outside\n        (Desktop only)\n    end note\n```\n\nKey drawer elements:\n- `.drawer-toggle` - Clickable trigger element\n- `.drawer-icon` - Visual icon that rotates on open/close\n- `.drawer-content` - Sliding content panel\n- Animation duration controlled by `--animation-duration` CSS variable\n\nSources: [public/style.css:789-856](), [public/index.html:68-83]()\n\n### Responsive Breakpoints\n\nThe UI adapts at the 1000px breakpoint for mobile/tablet devices:\n\n```mermaid\ngraph LR\n    Desktop[\"Desktop\u003cbr/\u003e\u003e1000px\"] --\u003e DesktopFeatures[\"• Resizable sheld\u003cbr/\u003e• Drawer pinning\u003cbr/\u003e• Hover interactions\u003cbr/\u003e• Multi-column grids\"]\n    \n    Mobile[\"Mobile/Tablet\u003cbr/\u003e≤1000px\"] --\u003e MobileFeatures[\"• Full-width layout\u003cbr/\u003e• Touch gestures\u003cbr/\u003e• Simplified drawers\u003cbr/\u003e• Reduced columns\"]\n    \n    style Desktop fill:#e1f5ff\n    style Mobile fill:#fff4e1\n```\n\nMobile adaptations include:\n- Full viewport width for `#sheld` and drawers\n- Disabled resize functionality\n- Touch-optimized spacing\n- Simplified navigation panels\n\nSources: [public/css/mobile-styles.css:2-300](), [public/scripts/RossAscends-mods.js]() (isMobile function)\n\n---\n\n## Character and Entity Display\n\n### Character List Rendering\n\nThe `printCharacters()` function (and its debounced variant `printCharactersDebounced`) renders the character list by calling `getEntitiesList()`, applying filters, and generating entity blocks.\n\n**Rendering Pipeline**\n\n```mermaid\nflowchart TB\n    Trigger[\"printCharacters(fullRefresh=false)\"]\n    \n    Trigger --\u003e CheckRefresh{\"fullRefresh?\"}\n    CheckRefresh --\u003e|true| ResetPage[\"saveCharactersPage = 0\"]\n    CheckRefresh --\u003e|false| Continue[\"Continue\"]\n    ResetPage --\u003e Continue\n    \n    Continue --\u003e VerifySearch[\"verifyCharactersSearchSortRule()\u003cbr/\u003eShow/hide search sort option\"]\n    VerifySearch --\u003e PrintFilters[\"printTagFilters(tag_filter_type.character)\"]\n    PrintFilters --\u003e GetEntities[\"getEntitiesList({doFilter: true})\"]\n    \n    GetEntities --\u003e ApplyFilter[\"entitiesFilter.applyFilters()\"]\n    ApplyFilter --\u003e Sort[\"sortEntitiesList()\u003cbr/\u003eby power_user.sort_field/sort_order\"]\n    \n    Sort --\u003e Pagination[\"$('#rm_print_characters_pagination').pagination()\"]\n    \n    Pagination --\u003e Callback[\"pagination callback\"]\n    Callback --\u003e ClearList[\"$('#rm_print_characters_block').empty()\"]\n    \n    ClearList --\u003e LoopEntities[\"For each entity\"]\n    LoopEntities --\u003e CheckType{\"entity.type\"}\n    \n    CheckType --\u003e|\"character\"| GetCharBlock[\"getCharacterBlock(item, id)\"]\n    CheckType --\u003e|\"group\"| GetGroupBlock[\"getGroupBlock(item)\"]\n    CheckType --\u003e|\"tag\"| GetTagBlock[\"getTagBlock(item, entities, hidden, isUseless)\"]\n    \n    GetCharBlock --\u003e Append[\"Append to #rm_print_characters_block\"]\n    GetGroupBlock --\u003e Append\n    GetTagBlock --\u003e Append\n    \n    Append --\u003e EmitEvent[\"eventSource.emit(event_types.CHARACTER_PAGE_LOADED)\"]\n```\n\n**Entity Block Template Structure**\n\n```javascript\n// Character block structure from getCharacterBlock()\nfunction getCharacterBlock(item, id) {\n    const template = $('#character_template .character_select').clone();\n    template.attr({'data-chid': id, 'id': `CharID${id}`});\n    template.find('img').attr('src', getThumbnailUrl('avatar', item.avatar));\n    template.find('.ch_name').text(item.name);\n    template.find('.ch_fav_icon').css('display', 'none');\n    template.toggleClass('is_fav', item.fav);\n    // ... description, tags, version info\n    return template;\n}\n```\n\n**DOM Structure of Character Card**\n\n```\n.character_select [data-chid=\"0\"]\n├── .character_select_container\n│   ├── .avatar\n│   │   └── img [src=thumbnail URL]\n│   └── .character_name_block\n│       ├── .ch_name (character name)\n│       ├── .character_name_block_sub_line\n│       │   ├── .character_version (power_user.aux_field display)\n│       │   └── .ch_fav_icon\n│       ├── .ch_description (creator_notes preview)\n│       └── .tags_inline (tag list via printTagList())\n```\n\nSources: [public/script.js:938-1027](), [public/script.js:882-928](), [public/index.html:character_template]()\n\n### Display Modes\n\n**Grid View Mode**\n\nActivated via `power_user.charListGrid`, grid view changes the layout to a wrapped grid:\n\n| Property | List View | Grid View |\n|----------|-----------|-----------|\n| Container | `flex-direction: column` | `flex-direction: row; flex-wrap: wrap` |\n| Card width | `100%` | `30%` (max 100px) |\n| Card orientation | Row | Column |\n| Description | Visible | Hidden |\n| Tags | Inline | Hidden |\n\nGrid view CSS selector: `body.charListGrid #rm_print_characters_block`\n\nSources: [public/css/toggle-dependent.css:62-160](), [public/scripts/power-user.js:122-123]()\n\n**Big Avatars Mode**\n\nActivated via `body.big-avatars`, scales avatars by configurable factors:\n\n```css\n--big-avatar-height-factor: 1.8\n--big-avatar-width-factor: 1.2\n--big-avatar-border-factor: 5\n\n.avatar {\n    width: calc(var(--avatar-base-width) * var(--big-avatar-width-factor));\n    height: calc(var(--avatar-base-height) * var(--big-avatar-height-factor));\n}\n```\n\nSources: [public/css/toggle-dependent.css:1-160]()\n\n### Filtering and Sorting\n\n**FilterHelper Integration**\n\n```mermaid\ngraph LR\n    Input[\"User Input\u003cbr/\u003eSearch/Tag selection\"]\n    \n    Input --\u003e FilterHelper[\"entitiesFilter\u003cbr/\u003eFilterHelper instance\"]\n    \n    FilterHelper --\u003e Types[\"Filter Types\u003cbr/\u003eFILTER_TYPES.SEARCH\u003cbr/\u003eFILTER_TYPES.TAG\u003cbr/\u003eFILTER_TYPES.FOLDER\"]\n    \n    Types --\u003e Apply[\"applyFilters(entities)\u003cbr/\u003eReturns filtered array\"]\n    \n    Apply --\u003e Debounce[\"printCharactersDebounced()\u003cbr/\u003e100ms debounce\"]\n    \n    Debounce --\u003e Rerender[\"Re-render character list\"]\n    \n    style FilterHelper fill:#e1f5ff\n    style Debounce fill:#fff4e1\n```\n\nSorting options controlled by `power_user.sort_field` and `power_user.sort_order`:\n- **Fields**: `name`, `date_added`, `chat_date`, `create_date`\n- **Order**: `asc`, `desc`\n- **Special**: `search` (fuzzy search relevance, only shown when searching)\n\nSources: [public/script.js:614](), [public/script.js:1029-1047](), [public/scripts/power-user.js:158-160]()\n\n### Pagination\n\nPagination uses the `pagination.js` library with customizable page sizes:\n\n```javascript\n// Pagination configuration\n$('#rm_print_characters_pagination').pagination({\n    dataSource: entities,\n    pageSize: Number(accountStorage.getItem('Characters_PerPage')) || 50,\n    pageRange: 1,\n    showPageNumbers: false,\n    showSizeChanger: true,\n    prevText: '\u003c',\n    nextText: '\u003e',\n    formatNavigator: PAGINATION_TEMPLATE,  // '\u003c%= rangeStart %\u003e-\u003c%= rangeEnd %\u003e .. \u003c%= totalNumber %\u003e'\n    callback: function(data) { /* render page */ }\n});\n```\n\nPage size options: `[10, 25, 50, 100, 250, 500, 1000]`\n\nSources: [public/script.js:963-1023](), [public/scripts/utils.js:28-86]()\n\n---\n\n## Chat Display\n\n### Message Rendering\n\nMessages are rendered by cloning `#message_template .mes` and appending to `#chat`. The `addOneMessage()` function handles message creation and DOM insertion.\n\n**Message Creation Flow**\n\n```mermaid\nsequenceDiagram\n    participant Caller as \"Generate() or printMessages()\"\n    participant Add as addOneMessage()\n    participant Template as messageTemplate\n    participant Format as messageFormatting\n    participant Macros as substituteParams()\n    participant Events as eventSource\n    participant DOM as \"#chat\"\n    \n    Caller-\u003e\u003eAdd: addOneMessage(mes, type, insertBefore, scroll)\n    Add-\u003e\u003eTemplate: messageTemplate.clone()\n    Template--\u003e\u003eAdd: jQuery .mes element\n    \n    Add-\u003e\u003eAdd: Set attributes (data-mesid, is_user, etc)\n    Add-\u003e\u003eMacros: substituteParams(mes.mes)\n    Macros--\u003e\u003eAdd: Text with {{macros}} replaced\n    \n    Add-\u003e\u003eFormat: messageFormatting.output(text, ...)\n    Format--\u003e\u003eAdd: Markdown converted to HTML\n    \n    Add-\u003e\u003eAdd: Populate .ch_name, .mes_text, etc\n    Add-\u003e\u003eEvents: emit MESSAGE_RECEIVED\n    \n    alt insertBefore specified\n        Add-\u003e\u003eDOM: insertBefore(target)\n    else normal append\n        Add-\u003e\u003eDOM: append(element)\n    end\n    \n    Add-\u003e\u003eEvents: emit MESSAGE_RENDERED/CHARACTER_MESSAGE_RENDERED\n    Events-\u003e\u003eDOM: Extensions modify message\n```\n\n**Message DOM Structure**\n\n```\n.mes [data-mesid=\"5\" is_user=\"true\" is_system=\"false\"]\n├── .mesAvatarWrapper\n│   └── .avatar\n│       └── img [src=getThumbnailUrl('persona', user_avatar)]\n├── .mes_block\n│   ├── .mes_header_block\n│   │   ├── .ch_name (name1 or name2)\n│   │   ├── .mes_timer (generation time)\n│   │   ├── .tokenCounterDisplay (token count)\n│   │   └── .mesIDDisplay (message ID)\n│   ├── .mes_text [data-swipeid=\"0\"]\n│   │   ├── .mes_bias (if bias strings present)\n│   │   ├── .mes_reasoning_details (if reasoning present)\n│   │   └── (markdown-rendered message content)\n│   ├── .mes_buttons\n│   │   ├── .mes_edit\n│   │   ├── .mes_prompt\n│   │   ├── .mes_copy\n│   │   └── (other action buttons)\n│   ├── .swipe_left\n│   └── .swipe_right\n└── .avatar_div (additional avatar display)\n```\n\n**Key Functions**\n\n- `addOneMessage(mes, type, insertBefore, scroll)` - Main rendering function\n- `messageFormatting.output(text)` - Markdown conversion (uses showdown converter)\n- `substituteParams(text)` - Macro replacement ({{char}}, {{user}}, etc)\n- `showSwipeButtons()` / `hideSwipeButtons()` - Swipe button visibility\n\nSources: [public/script.js:addOneMessage function](), [public/index.html:message_template](), [public/script.js:418-420]()\n\n### Avatar System\n\nAvatar display is controlled by multiple settings:\n\n| Setting | Values | Effect |\n|---------|--------|--------|\n| `power_user.avatar_style` | `ROUND`, `RECTANGULAR`, `SQUARE`, `ROUNDED` | Border radius |\n| `power_user.never_resize_avatars` | `true`/`false` | Fixed vs. responsive size |\n| `power_user.hideChatAvatars_enabled` | `true`/`false` | Show/hide avatars in chat |\n\n**Avatar Style Classes**\n\n```css\nbody.round-avatars .avatar { border-radius: 50%; }\nbody.square-avatars .avatar { border-radius: 2px; }\nbody.rounded-avatars .avatar { border-radius: 10px; }\n```\n\nAvatar sources are resolved through `getThumbnailUrl()` which generates optimized thumbnails:\n- **Characters**: `/thumbnail?type=avatar\u0026file=\u003cfilename\u003e`\n- **Users**: `/thumbnail?type=persona\u0026file=\u003cfilename\u003e`\n- **Groups**: Generated avatar collage\n\nSources: [public/scripts/power-user.js:91-96](), [public/css/toggle-dependent.css:50-58]()\n\n### Chat Display Modes\n\nThree chat display modes are available via `power_user.chat_display`:\n\n**DEFAULT Mode (0)**\n- Standard message blocks with avatars on the side\n- Messages aligned left for bots, right for users\n- Full-width text area\n\n**BUBBLES Mode (1)**\n- Compact message bubbles\n- Alternating alignment\n- Reduced padding and margins\n- Applied via `body.bubblesUI` class\n\n**DOCUMENT Mode (2)**\n- Centered, document-like layout\n- Uniform message styling\n- No user/bot visual distinction\n- Applied via `body.documentUI` class\n\nSources: [public/scripts/power-user.js:98-102]()\n\n### Swipe Mechanics\n\nSwipes store alternative message generations. Each message has a `swipes[]` array and `swipe_id` to track the current swipe.\n\n**Swipe Data Structure**\n\n```javascript\n// Chat message with swipe data\nchat[mesId] = {\n    mes: \"Current message text\",\n    swipes: [\n        \"First generation\",\n        \"Second generation\",\n        \"Third generation\"\n    ],\n    swipe_id: 1,  // Currently showing swipes[1]\n    swipe_info: [\n        { send_date: \"...\", gen_started: \"...\", gen_finished: \"...\" },\n        { send_date: \"...\", gen_started: \"...\", gen_finished: \"...\" },\n        { send_date: \"...\", gen_started: \"...\", gen_finished: \"...\" }\n    ]\n};\n```\n\n**Swipe State Management**\n\n```mermaid\nstateDiagram-v2\n    [*] --\u003e SingleSwipe: \"chat[id].swipes.length === 1\"\n    SingleSwipe --\u003e MultipleSwipes: \"Generate() creates new swipe\"\n    \n    MultipleSwipes --\u003e ButtonsVisible: \"showSwipeButtons() called\"\n    ButtonsVisible --\u003e SwipeLeft: \"Click .swipe_left\"\n    ButtonsVisible --\u003e SwipeRight: \"Click .swipe_right\"\n    \n    SwipeLeft --\u003e DecrementId: \"chat[id].swipe_id--\"\n    SwipeRight --\u003e IncrementId: \"chat[id].swipe_id++\"\n    \n    DecrementId --\u003e UpdateContent: \"updateMessage(mesId)\"\n    IncrementId --\u003e UpdateContent\n    \n    UpdateContent --\u003e ButtonsVisible: \".mes_text updated\"\n    \n    ButtonsVisible --\u003e ButtonsHidden: \"swipesHidden = true\"\n    ButtonsHidden --\u003e [*]\n    \n    note right of ButtonsVisible\n        Buttons only show on last message\n        when swipes.length \u003e 1\n        and !swipesHidden\n    end note\n```\n\n**Swipe Button Visibility Logic**\n\n```javascript\n// From showSwipeButtons()\nfunction showSwipeButtons() {\n    if (chat.length === 0) return;\n    if (swipesHidden) return;\n    \n    const lastMes = chat[chat.length - 1];\n    if (!lastMes.swipes || lastMes.swipes.length \u003c= 1) return;\n    \n    const swipe_id = lastMes.swipe_id;\n    const swipeCounterText = `${swipe_id + 1}/${lastMes.swipes.length}`;\n    \n    $('.last_mes .swipe_left').css('display', 'flex');\n    $('.last_mes .swipe_right').css('display', 'flex');\n    $('.last_mes .swipes-counter').text(swipeCounterText);\n}\n```\n\nSources: [public/script.js:swipe functions](), [public/script.js:587-596](), [public/index.html:swipe_left/swipe_right elements]()\n\n### Message Actions\n\nMessage action buttons appear on hover (desktop) or are always visible (mobile):\n\n**Available Actions**\n\n| Button | Function | Condition |\n|--------|----------|-----------|\n| `.mes_edit` | Edit message | Any message |\n| `.mes_prompt` | View prompt | Has `gen_id` metadata |\n| `.mes_copy` | Copy to clipboard | Any message |\n| `.mes_delete` | Delete message | Any message |\n| `.mes_regenerate` | Regenerate | Last bot message |\n| `.mes_continue` | Continue generation | Last message |\n| `.mes_bookmark` | Create bookmark | Any message |\n| `.mes_translate` | Translate | Extension loaded |\n\nExtensions can add custom buttons to `.extraMesButtons` container.\n\nSources: [public/index.html:mes_buttons template](), [public/script.js:message rendering functions]()\n\n---\n\n## Theming and Customization\n\n### Theme System\n\nThemes modify CSS custom properties to change the entire UI appearance.\n\n**Theme Architecture**\n\n```mermaid\ngraph TB\n    ThemeFile[\"Theme JSON File\u003cbr/\u003ethemes/*.json\"]\n    \n    ThemeFile --\u003e Load[\"loadTheme(name)\"]\n    Load --\u003e Props[\"Set CSS Variables\u003cbr/\u003e--SmartTheme* properties\"]\n    \n    Props --\u003e Colors[\"Color Properties\u003cbr/\u003eBodyColor, EmColor\u003cbr/\u003eQuoteColor, etc.\"]\n    Props --\u003e Effects[\"Effect Properties\u003cbr/\u003eBlurStrength\u003cbr/\u003eShadowColor\"]\n    \n    Colors --\u003e Body[\"body element\u003cbr/\u003estyle attribute\"]\n    Effects --\u003e Body\n    \n    Body --\u003e Render[\"Browser re-renders\u003cbr/\u003ewith new theme\"]\n    \n    style ThemeFile fill:#e1f5ff\n    style Props fill:#fff4e1\n```\n\n**Key Theme Variables**\n\n| Variable | Purpose | Example |\n|----------|---------|---------|\n| `--SmartThemeBodyColor` | Primary text color | `rgb(220, 220, 210)` |\n| `--SmartThemeEmColor` | Emphasis/muted text | `rgb(145, 145, 145)` |\n| `--SmartThemeQuoteColor` | Quote highlights | `rgb(225, 138, 36)` |\n| `--SmartThemeBlurTintColor` | Background tint for blur | `rgba(23, 23, 23, 1)` |\n| `--SmartThemeChatTintColor` | Chat area tint | `rgba(23, 23, 23, 1)` |\n| `--SmartThemeBorderColor` | Border color | `rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)` |\n| `--SmartThemeShadowColor` | Text shadow color | `rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)` |\n\nThemes are stored in `power_user.theme` and can include custom CSS via `power_user.custom_css`.\n\nSources: [public/scripts/power-user.js:165-174](), [public/style.css:69-89]()\n\n### Font and Scale Settings\n\n**Font Controls**\n\n- `power_user.font_scale` - Multiplier for `--mainFontSize` (default: 1)\n- `--mainFontSize: calc(var(--fontScale) * 15px)`\n- `--mainFontFamily` - Font family (default: \"Noto Sans\")\n- `--monoFontFamily` - Monospace font for code (default: \"Noto Sans Mono\")\n\n**Visual Effects**\n\n- `power_user.blur_strength` - Backdrop blur intensity (0-20, default: 10)\n  - Applied as `--SmartThemeBlurStrength: calc(var(--blurStrength) * 1px)`\n- `power_user.shadow_width` - Text shadow width (0-10, default: 2)\n  - Applied as `text-shadow: 0px 0px calc(var(--shadowWidth) * 1px) var(--SmartThemeShadowColor)`\n\nSources: [public/scripts/power-user.js:161-163](), [public/style.css:94-104]()\n\n### Animation Duration\n\nAll animations respect a global duration setting with support for reduced motion:\n\n```javascript\n// Set animation duration (default: 125ms)\nsetAnimationDuration(ms) {\n    animation_duration = ms ?? ANIMATION_DURATION_DEFAULT;\n    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--animation-duration', `${animation_duration}ms`);\n}\n\n// Reduced motion disables animations\nif (power_user.reduced_motion) {\n    setAnimationDuration(0);\n}\n```\n\nCSS usage:\n```css\n.animated {\n    animation-duration: var(--animation-duration, 3s);\n}\n.transition-element {\n    transition: opacity var(--animation-duration-2x);  /* 2x duration */\n}\n```\n\nSources: [public/script.js:770-774](), [public/script.js:565-566]()\n\n### Chat Width and Layout\n\n`power_user.chat_width` controls the width of `#sheld` as a percentage (10-100):\n\n```css\n:root {\n    --sheldWidth: 50vw;  /* Default 50% */\n}\n\n#sheld {\n    width: var(--sheldWidth);\n}\n```\n\nOn mobile (≤1000px), this is forced to `100dvw`.\n\nSources: [public/scripts/power-user.js:150](), [public/style.css:91]()\n\n---\n\n## Persona Management UI\n\n### Persona List Display\n\nPersonas (user avatars) are displayed in `#user_avatar_block` with similar rendering to character cards.\n\n**Persona Block Rendering**\n\n```mermaid\nflowchart TB\n    Trigger[\"getUserAvatars(doRender=true)\"]\n    \n    Trigger --\u003e Fetch[\"GET /api/avatars\"]\n    Fetch --\u003e Filter[\"personasFilter.applyFilters()\"]\n    Filter --\u003e Sort[\"sortPersonas()\"]\n    Sort --\u003e Paginate[\"pagination.js\"]\n    \n    Paginate --\u003e Render[\"For each persona:\u003cbr/\u003egetUserAvatarBlock()\"]\n    \n    Render --\u003e Block[\"Create .avatar-container\"]\n    Block --\u003e SetData[\"Set persona name\u003cbr/\u003eSet description\u003cbr/\u003eSet connections\"]\n    SetData --\u003e Append[\"Append to #user_avatar_block\"]\n    \n    subgraph \"Persona Data Sources\"\n        PowerUser[\"power_user.personas\u003cbr/\u003e{avatarId: name}\"]\n        Descriptions[\"power_user.persona_descriptions\u003cbr/\u003e{avatarId: {description, title}}\"]\n    end\n    \n    SetData --\u003e PowerUser\n    SetData --\u003e Descriptions\n    \n    style Trigger fill:#e1f5ff\n    style Render fill:#fff4e1\n```\n\nSources: [public/scripts/personas.js:234-330](), [public/scripts/personas.js:191-214]()\n\n### Persona State Management\n\n**PersonaState Tracking**\n\nEach persona tracks its lock state and default status:\n\n```typescript\ntype PersonaState = {\n    avatarId: string;           // The avatar filename\n    default: boolean;           // Is default for new chats\n    locked: {\n        chat: boolean;          // Locked to current chat\n        character: boolean;     // Locked to current character/group\n    }\n}\n```\n\n**Lock State Priority**\n\n```mermaid\ngraph TB\n    ChatStart[\"New chat/character selected\"]\n    \n    ChatStart --\u003e CheckChatLock[\"Is persona locked to\u003cbr/\u003ecurrent chat?\"]\n    CheckChatLock --\u003e|Yes| UseChatPersona[\"Use chat's\u003cbr/\u003echat_metadata.persona_avatar\"]\n    CheckChatLock --\u003e|No| CheckCharLock[\"Is persona locked to\u003cbr/\u003ethis character?\"]\n    \n    CheckCharLock --\u003e|Yes| UseCharPersona[\"Use character's\u003cbr/\u003elocked persona\"]\n    CheckCharLock --\u003e|No| CheckDefault[\"Is there a\u003cbr/\u003edefault persona?\"]\n    \n    CheckDefault --\u003e|Yes| UseDefault[\"Use power_user.default_persona\"]\n    CheckDefault --\u003e|No| UseGlobalSetting[\"Use user_avatar from settings\"]\n    \n    style UseChatPersona fill:#e1f5ff\n    style UseCharPersona fill:#fff4e1\n    style UseDefault fill:#ffe1f5\n```\n\nSources: [public/scripts/personas.js:51-59](), [public/scripts/personas.js:updatePersonaUIStates]()\n\n### Persona Description Integration\n\nPersona descriptions can be injected at various positions:\n\n| Position | Value | Behavior |\n|----------|-------|----------|\n| IN_PROMPT | 0 | Part of prompt construction |\n| TOP_AN | 2 | Before Author's Note |\n| BOTTOM_AN | 3 | After Author's Note |\n| AT_DEPTH | 4 | At specific depth (like WI) |\n| NONE | 9 | Not included |\n\nConfiguration:\n- `power_user.persona_description_position` - Where to inject\n- `power_user.persona_description_depth` - Depth for AT_DEPTH mode\n- `power_user.persona_description_role` - Role type (system/user/assistant)\n\nSources: [public/scripts/personas.js](), [public/scripts/power-user.js:110-120]()\n\n---\n\n## Backgrounds System\n\n### Background Management\n\nBackground images are managed through a tabbed interface with two sources:\n\n**Background Source Types**\n\n```mermaid\ngraph LR\n    BgDrawer[\"#Backgrounds drawer\"]\n    \n    BgDrawer --\u003e GlobalTab[\"Global Backgrounds\u003cbr/\u003eBG_SOURCES.GLOBAL\u003cbr/\u003ebackgrounds/ folder\"]\n    BgDrawer --\u003e ChatTab[\"Chat-Specific\u003cbr/\u003eBG_SOURCES.CHAT\u003cbr/\u003eStored in chat_metadata\"]\n    \n    GlobalTab --\u003e GlobalList[\"#bg_menu_content\u003cbr/\u003eServer backgrounds\"]\n    ChatTab --\u003e ChatList[\"#bg_custom_content\u003cbr/\u003eUploaded/locked backgrounds\"]\n    \n    GlobalList --\u003e Select[\"User selects background\"]\n    ChatList --\u003e Select\n    \n    Select --\u003e Apply[\"background_settings.name\u003cbr/\u003ebackground_settings.url\"]\n    Apply --\u003e BG1[\"#bg1 background-image\"]\n    \n    style GlobalTab fill:#e1f5ff\n    style ChatTab fill:#fff4e1\n```\n\n**Background Lock Mechanism**\n\nChat-specific backgrounds use metadata to persist across sessions:\n\n```javascript\n// Lock background to chat\nchat_metadata[BG_METADATA_KEY] = {\n    name: backgroundName,\n    url: backgroundUrl,\n    custom: isCustom\n};\n\n// Background list for this chat\nchat_metadata[LIST_METADATA_KEY] = [\n    { filename: 'bg1.png', isCustom: true },\n    { filename: 'bg2.jpg', isCustom: false }\n];\n```\n\nSources: [public/scripts/backgrounds.js:14-62](), [public/scripts/backgrounds.js:background management functions]()\n\n### Background Display Modes\n\n**Fitting Options**\n\n| Mode | CSS Class | Behavior |\n|------|-----------|----------|\n| Cover | `.cover` | `background-size: cover` - Scales to fill, may crop |\n| Contain | `.contain` | `background-size: contain` - Shows entire image |\n| Stretch | `.stretch` | `background-size: 100% 100%` - Distorts to fill |\n| Center | `.center` | `background-size: auto; background-position: center` |\n\nAnimated backgrounds are supported via `background_settings.animation`.\n\nSources: [public/css/backgrounds.css:18-42]()\n\n### Thumbnail Lazy Loading\n\nBackgrounds use lazy loading via IntersectionObserver:\n\n```mermaid\nsequenceDiagram\n    participant Observer as IntersectionObserver\n    participant Clipper as .thumbnail-clipper\n    participant Cache as THUMBNAIL_BLOBS Map\n    participant Server as Thumbnail Endpoint\n    \n    Observer-\u003e\u003eClipper: Element enters viewport\n    Clipper-\u003e\u003eCache: Check for cached blob URL\n    \n    alt Cached\n        Cache--\u003e\u003eClipper: Return blob URL\n        Clipper-\u003e\u003eClipper: Set background-image\n    else Not Cached\n        Clipper-\u003e\u003eServer: Fetch thumbnail\n        Server--\u003e\u003eClipper: Return image blob\n        Clipper-\u003e\u003eCache: Store blob URL\n        Clipper-\u003e\u003eClipper: Set background-image\n    end\n    \n    Clipper-\u003e\u003eObserver: Unobserve element\n```\n\nThumbnail configuration:\n- Width: 160px\n- Height: 90px (16:9 aspect ratio)\n- Storage: `localforage` instance for client-side caching\n\nSources: [public/scripts/backgrounds.js:31-68](), [public/scripts/backgrounds.js:lazy loading implementation]()\n\n---\n\n## Keyboard Navigation and Accessibility\n\n### Interactable Element System\n\nThe `keyboard.js` module implements automatic keyboard navigation by detecting interactive elements and adding `tabindex` and event handlers.\n\n**Interactable Detection**\n\n```javascript\n// From public/scripts/keyboard.js\nconst interactableSelectors = [\n    '.interactable',\n    '.custom_interactable',\n    '.menu_button',\n    '.right_menu_button',\n    '.drawer-icon',\n    '.inline-drawer-icon',\n    '.paginationjs-pages li a',\n    '.group_select, .character_select, .bogus_folder_select',\n    '.avatar-container',\n    '.tag .tag_remove',\n    '.tag_as_folder',\n    '.tag.tag_view',\n    '.tags_inline .tag',\n    '.bogus_folder_back',\n    '.bogus_folder_hidden_tag_count',\n    '.mes_buttons .mes_button:not(.mes_img_expander)',\n    '.extraMesButtons .mes_button:not(.mes_img_expander)',\n    // ... more selectors\n];\n\nconst INTERACTABLE_CONTROL_CLASS = 'interactable';\n```\n\n**Initialization via MutationObserver**\n\n```mermaid\nsequenceDiagram\n    participant Observer as MutationObserver\n    participant Callback as observerCallback()\n    participant Check as isKeyboardInteractable()\n    participant Make as makeKeyboardInteractable()\n    participant Element as DOM Element\n    \n    Observer-\u003e\u003eCallback: DOM mutation detected\n    Callback-\u003e\u003eCallback: Loop through addedNodes\n    \n    loop For each node\n        Callback-\u003e\u003eCheck: isKeyboardInteractable(node)\n        \n        alt Matches selector \u0026\u0026 not disabled\n            Check--\u003e\u003eCallback: true\n            Callback-\u003e\u003eMake: makeKeyboardInteractable(node)\n            Make-\u003e\u003eElement: setAttribute('tabindex', '0')\n            Make-\u003e\u003eElement: classList.add('interactable')\n            Make-\u003e\u003eElement: addEventListener('keydown', ...)\n            Element--\u003e\u003eMake: Enter/Space trigger click()\n        else Does not match\n            Check--\u003e\u003eCallback: false\n        end\n    end\n```\n\n**Keyboard Event Handling**\n\n```javascript\n// From makeKeyboardInteractable()\nelement.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {\n    if (e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') {\n        e.preventDefault();\n        e.stopPropagation();\n        this.click();\n    }\n});\n```\n\n**Focus Styling**\n\n```css\n/* From public/style.css */\n.interactable:focus-visible {\n    outline: 1px solid var(--interactable-outline-color);\n}\n\nselect:focus-visible,\ninput:focus-visible,\ntextarea:focus-visible {\n    outline: 1px solid var(--interactable-outline-color-faint);\n}\n```\n\nSources: [public/scripts/keyboard.js:1-29](), [public/scripts/keyboard.js:55-94](), [public/style.css:291-314]()\n\n### Focus Management\n\n**Dynamic Focus Styles**\n\nThe `dynamic-styles.js` module generates `:focus-visible` styles based on existing `:hover` styles:\n\n```mermaid\ngraph TB\n    StyleSheet[\"Loaded CSS Stylesheet\"]\n    \n    StyleSheet --\u003e Scan[\"Scan for :hover rules\"]\n    Scan --\u003e Extract[\"Extract selector and properties\"]\n    Extract --\u003e Check[\"Has matching :focus rule?\"]\n    \n    Check --\u003e|No| Generate[\"Generate :focus-visible rule\u003cbr/\u003ewith hover properties\"]\n    Check --\u003e|Yes| Skip[\"Skip, already has focus style\"]\n    \n    Generate --\u003e Insert[\"Insert into dynamicStyleSheet\"]\n    Insert --\u003e Apply[\"Browser applies new styles\"]\n    \n    style Generate fill:#e1f5ff\n    style Apply fill:#fff4e1\n```\n\nThis ensures consistent hover/focus appearance without manually duplicating CSS rules.\n\nSources: [public/scripts/dynamic-styles.js:29-150]()\n\n### Disabled and Non-Focusable Elements\n\nElements can opt out of keyboard navigation:\n\n```javascript\n// Exclude from focus\nelement.classList.add('not_focusable');\n\n// Temporarily disable\nelement.classList.add('disabled');\nelement.setAttribute('tabindex', '-1');\n```\n\nDisabled elements are automatically skipped during keyboard navigation.\n\nSources: [public/scripts/keyboard.js:33-34]()\n\n### Accessibility Features\n\n**Screen Reader Support**\n\n- ARIA attributes on interactive elements\n- Semantic HTML structure (headers, lists, buttons)\n- Alt text on all images\n- Title attributes for icons\n\n**Keyboard Shortcuts**\n\nCommon interactions support keyboard:\n- `Enter`/`Space` - Activate focused element\n- `Escape` - Close drawers/popups\n- Arrow keys - Navigate lists/grids\n- Tab - Focus next element\n- Shift+Tab - Focus previous element\n\nSources: [public/scripts/a11y.js](), [public/scripts/keyboard.js:keyboard event handlers]()\n\n---\n\n## Popup System\n\n### Popup Architecture\n\nThe `Popup` class wraps jQuery UI Dialog to provide standardized modal dialogs with promise-based API.\n\n**Popup Class Definition**\n\n```javascript\n// From public/scripts/popup.js\nclass Popup {\n    constructor(body, type, inputValue = '', rows = 1) {\n        this.body = body;\n        this.ok = false;\n        this.type = type;\n        this.inputValue = inputValue;\n        this.rows = rows;\n    }\n    \n    async show() {\n        // Create dialog with jQuery UI\n        this.dlg = $(this.body).dialog({\n            modal: true,\n            width: '50%',\n            buttons: this.controls,\n            close: () =\u003e this.complete(POPUP_RESULT.CANCELLED)\n        });\n        \n        return new Promise((resolve) =\u003e {\n            this.resolve = resolve;\n        });\n    }\n    \n    complete(result) {\n        this.ok = (result === POPUP_RESULT.AFFIRMATIVE);\n        if (this.resolve) this.resolve(result);\n        $(this.body).dialog('close');\n    }\n}\n\n// Factory function\nasync function callGenericPopup(text, type, inputValue = '', options = {}) {\n    const safeValue = DOMPurify.sanitize(text);\n    const body = $('\u003cdiv\u003e\u003c/div\u003e').append($('\u003cp\u003e\u003c/p\u003e').html(safeValue));\n    const popup = new Popup(body, type, inputValue);\n    return await popup.show();\n}\n```\n\n**Popup Type Enum**\n\n```javascript\nconst POPUP_TYPE = {\n    TEXT: 'text',           // Display text with OK button\n    CONFIRM: 'confirm',     // Yes/No/Cancel buttons\n    INPUT: 'input',         // Text input field\n    DISPLAY: 'display',     // Custom content display\n    ALTERNATE_DISPLAY: 'alternate_display'  // Alt custom display\n};\n\nconst POPUP_RESULT = {\n    AFFIRMATIVE: 1,    // User clicked Yes/OK\n    NEGATIVE: 2,       // User clicked No\n    CANCELLED: 0,      // User closed/cancelled\n    INTERRUPTABLE: 3   // Popup can be interrupted\n};\n```\n\n**Usage Example**\n\n```javascript\n// Confirmation dialog\nconst result = await callGenericPopup('Delete this message?', POPUP_TYPE.CONFIRM);\nif (result === POPUP_RESULT.AFFIRMATIVE) {\n    // User confirmed\n}\n\n// Text input\nconst result = await callGenericPopup('Enter name:', POPUP_TYPE.INPUT, 'default value');\nif (result) {\n    const userInput = result;  // Returns input value\n}\n```\n\nSources: [public/scripts/popup.js:Popup class](), [public/scripts/popup.js:POPUP_TYPE enum](), [public/scripts/popup.js:callGenericPopup]()\n\n### Z-Index Layering\n\nPopups and overlays follow a strict z-index hierarchy:\n\n| Layer | Z-Index | Elements |\n|-------|---------|----------|\n| Background | -1 | `#bg1` |\n| Base | 0 | Chat, sheld |\n| Drawers | 3005-3010 | Top bar, drawers |\n| World Info | 3010 | `#world_popup` |\n| Toasts | 10000 | Toastr notifications |\n| Popups | 3100-9000 | Modal dialogs |\n| Select2 | 40000 | Dropdown menus |\n\nSources: [public/style.css:z-index values throughout]()\n\n---\n\n## Toast Notifications\n\n### Toastr Configuration\n\nSillyTavern uses Toastr for non-blocking notifications:\n\n```javascript\ntoastr.options = {\n    positionClass: 'toast-top-center',  // Configurable\n    closeButton: false,\n    progressBar: false,\n    timeOut: 4000,\n    extendedTimeOut: 10000,\n    showMethod: 'fadeIn',\n    hideMethod: 'fadeOut',\n    escapeHtml: true\n};\n```\n\n**Toast Positions**\n\nAvailable via `power_user.toastr_position`:\n\n```\ntoast-top-left      toast-top-center      toast-top-right\ntoast-bottom-left   toast-bottom-center   toast-bottom-right\n```\n\nSources: [public/script.js:340-362](), [public/scripts/power-user.js:69-76]()\n\n---\n\n## Mobile and Touch Optimization\n\n### Touch Gesture Handling\n\nOn mobile devices, touch events are handled differently:\n\n**Gesture Detection**\n\n```mermaid\nstateDiagram-v2\n    [*] --\u003e Idle\n    Idle --\u003e TouchStart: touchstart event\n    TouchStart --\u003e Tracking: Store initial position\n    Tracking --\u003e TouchMove: touchmove event\n    Tracking --\u003e TouchEnd: touchend event\n    TouchMove --\u003e Tracking: Update position\n    TouchEnd --\u003e EvaluateGesture: Calculate delta\n    \n    EvaluateGesture --\u003e Swipe: |delta| \u003e threshold\n    EvaluateGesture --\u003e Tap: |delta| \u003c threshold\n    EvaluateGesture --\u003e Idle\n    \n    Swipe --\u003e Idle: Execute swipe action\n    Tap --\u003e Idle: Execute tap action\n```\n\nMobile optimizations:\n- `getSortableDelay()` returns 750ms on mobile (vs. 50ms desktop) to prevent accidental drags\n- Touch targets increased in size\n- Hover effects replaced with tap-activated states\n- Drawers always full-width\n\nSources: [public/scripts/utils.js:347-349](), [public/scripts/RossAscends-mods.js:isMobile](), [public/css/mobile-styles.css]()\n\n### Viewport Management\n\nMobile devices require special viewport handling:\n\n```javascript\n// Set document height for mobile browsers\nasync function fixViewport() {\n    document.body.style.position = 'absolute';\n    await delay(1);\n    document.body.style.position = '';\n}\n\n// Prevent overscroll\nbody {\n    touch-action: none;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    position: fixed;\n}\n```\n\nThis prevents address bar show/hide from causing layout issues.\n\nSources: [public/script.js:737-741](), [public/css/mobile-styles.css:179-183]()\n\n---\n\n## Summary\n\nThe SillyTavern UI is built on a flexible, themeable architecture with:\n\n1. **Modular Layout**: Drawer-based panels, resizable main area, responsive breakpoints\n2. **Entity Display**: Paginated character/group lists with filtering, sorting, and multiple view modes\n3. **Rich Chat Interface**: Message rendering with avatars, swipes, actions, and formatting\n4. **Extensive Customization**: Themes, fonts, colors, layouts, and display modes\n5. **Comprehensive Keyboard Navigation**: Full keyboard accessibility with dynamic focus styles\n6. **Mobile Optimization**: Touch gestures, viewport handling, and responsive layouts\n\nThe UI leverages CSS custom properties for dynamic theming, event-driven updates for reactive behavior, and progressive enhancement for accessibility.\n\nSources: [public/script.js](), [public/index.html](), [public/style.css](), [public/scripts/power-user.js](), [public/scripts/personas.js](), [public/scripts/backgrounds.js](), [public/scripts/keyboard.js](), [public/scripts/dynamic-styles.js](), [public/css/*.css files]()"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"2a:T5120,"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"# Main UI Components and Layout\n\n\u003cdetails\u003e\n\u003csummary\u003eRelevant source files\u003c/summary\u003e\n\nThe following files were used as context for generating this wiki page:\n\n- [public/css/backgrounds.css](public/css/backgrounds.css)\n- [public/css/mobile-styles.css](public/css/mobile-styles.css)\n- [public/css/select2-overrides.css](public/css/select2-overrides.css)\n- [public/css/st-tailwind.css](public/css/st-tailwind.css)\n- [public/css/tags.css](public/css/tags.css)\n- [public/css/toggle-dependent.css](public/css/toggle-dependent.css)\n- [public/css/world-info.css](public/css/world-info.css)\n- [public/index.html](public/index.html)\n- [public/script.js](public/script.js)\n- [public/scripts/a11y.js](public/scripts/a11y.js)\n- [public/scripts/backgrounds.js](public/scripts/backgrounds.js)\n- [public/scripts/dynamic-styles.js](public/scripts/dynamic-styles.js)\n- [public/scripts/filters.js](public/scripts/filters.js)\n- [public/scripts/group-chats.js](public/scripts/group-chats.js)\n- [public/scripts/instruct-mode.js](public/scripts/instruct-mode.js)\n- [public/scripts/keyboard.js](public/scripts/keyboard.js)\n- [public/scripts/personas.js](public/scripts/personas.js)\n- [public/scripts/power-user.js](public/scripts/power-user.js)\n- [public/scripts/sse-stream.js](public/scripts/sse-stream.js)\n- [public/scripts/tags.js](public/scripts/tags.js)\n- [public/scripts/utils.js](public/scripts/utils.js)\n- [public/scripts/world-info.js](public/scripts/world-info.js)\n- [public/style.css](public/style.css)\n\n\u003c/details\u003e\n\n\n\nThis page documents the primary user interface components and layout structure of SillyTavern's frontend. It covers the DOM hierarchy, main containers, chat display, character selection, and input areas. For information about theming and visual customization, see [Backgrounds and Theming](#4.5). For message rendering specifics, including markdown and formatting, see the sections on prompt management and chat utilities.\n\n## Purpose and Scope\n\nSillyTavern's UI follows a three-column responsive layout with a central chat area (`#sheld`), flanked by optional side panels. The interface is built using jQuery and vanilla JavaScript with extensive CSS customization. This document describes the structural components, their DOM identifiers, and how they interact to create the chat experience.\n\n## Layout Architecture\n\nThe application uses a fixed-viewport design with absolute positioning for major containers. The root structure consists of:\n\n```mermaid\ngraph TB\n    Body[\"\u003cbody\u003e\"]\n    Preloader[\"#preloader\"]\n    Background[\"#bg1\"]\n    TopBar[\"#top-bar\u003cbr/\u003eFixed top navigation\"]\n    TopSettings[\"#top-settings-holder\u003cbr/\u003eDrawers and panels\"]\n    Sheld[\"#sheld\u003cbr/\u003eMain chat container\"]\n    ContextMenu[\"#character_context_menu\"]\n    \n    Body --\u003e Preloader\n    Body --\u003e Background\n    Body --\u003e TopBar\n    Body --\u003e TopSettings\n    Body --\u003e Sheld\n    Body --\u003e ContextMenu\n    \n    TopSettings --\u003e LeftDrawer[\"#ai-config-button\u003cbr/\u003eAI configuration drawer\"]\n    TopSettings --\u003e RightDrawer[\"Right menu panels\"]\n    \n    Sheld --\u003e Chat[\"#chat\u003cbr/\u003eMessage display\"]\n    Sheld --\u003e FormSheld[\"#form_sheld\u003cbr/\u003eInput area container\"]\n    \n    FormSheld --\u003e SendForm[\"#send_form\u003cbr/\u003eInput controls\"]\n```\n\n**Sources:** [public/index.html:51-67](), [public/style.css:750-788]()\n\n### Key Container Elements\n\n| Element ID | Purpose | CSS Class Pattern | Position |\n|------------|---------|-------------------|----------|\n| `#top-bar` | Navigation bar with status indicators | `.topBarIconSize` | `absolute`, top: 0 |\n| `#sheld` | Main chat window container | `.drag-grabber` (when movable) | `absolute`, centered |\n| `#chat` | Scrollable message area | `.mes` children | Flexbox column |\n| `#form_sheld` | Input area wrapper | - | Bottom of `#sheld` |\n| `#rm_print_characters_block` | Character list | `.character_select` children | Right panel |\n\nThe layout uses CSS variables for dynamic sizing:\n\n- `--sheldWidth`: Chat container width (default 50vw)\n- `--topBarBlockSize`: Top bar height\n- `--bottomFormBlockSize`: Input area height\n- `--mainFontSize`: Base font scaling\n\n**Sources:** [public/style.css:19-132](), [public/index.html:64-67]()\n\n## Top Bar Components\n\nThe top bar provides global navigation and status information:\n\n```mermaid\ngraph LR\n    TopBar[\"#top-bar\"]\n    \n    TopBar --\u003e StatusIndicator[\"Online status indicator\u003cbr/\u003e.online_status_*\"]\n    TopBar --\u003e VersionDisplay[\"#version_display\"]\n    TopBar --\u003e NavButtons[\"Navigation buttons\"]\n    TopBar --\u003e OptionsButton[\"#options_button\u003cbr/\u003ewith Popper menu\"]\n    \n    StatusIndicator --\u003e StatusText[\".online_status_text\"]\n    StatusIndicator --\u003e StatusIcon[\".online_status_indicator\"]\n```\n\nThe top bar is implemented with a fixed-height container using backdrop filters for translucency. Status updates are managed by the `displayOnlineStatus()` function.\n\n**Key Functions:**\n- `displayOnlineStatus()` - Updates connection status indicator [public/script.js:760-768]()\n- `setOnlineStatus(status)` - Sets the `online_status` variable and triggers UI update\n- `getClientVersion()` - Fetches and displays version information [public/script.js:473-490]()\n\n**Sources:** [public/index.html:63-65](), [public/style.css:752-766](), [public/script.js:760-768]()\n\n## Main Chat Container (Sheld)\n\nThe `#sheld` element is the primary container for chat interaction. Its name derives from a portmanteau and serves as the draggable, resizable chat window.\n\n```mermaid\ngraph TB\n    Sheld[\"#sheld\u003cbr/\u003ewidth: var(--sheldWidth)\"]\n    SheldHeader[\"#sheldheader\u003cbr/\u003e(drag handle)\"]\n    ChatArea[\"#chat\u003cbr/\u003eflex-grow: 1\"]\n    FormSheld[\"#form_sheld\"]\n    \n    Sheld --\u003e ChatArea\n    Sheld --\u003e FormSheld\n    Sheld -.-\u003e SheldHeader\n    \n    ChatArea --\u003e Messages[\"Message blocks\u003cbr/\u003e.mes elements\"]\n    FormSheld --\u003e SendForm[\"#send_form\"]\n    FormSheld --\u003e QRArea[\"Quick Reply area\"]\n```\n\n**DOM Structure:**\n- Position: `absolute`, centered horizontally\n- Height: `calc(100dvh - topBarBlockSize - 1px)`\n- Display: `flex`, `flex-direction: column`\n- Overflow: `hidden` on sheld, `scroll` on `#chat`\n\n**Movable UI:**\nWhen `power_user.movingUI` is enabled, the sheld becomes draggable via `dragElement()`. The position is persisted in `power_user.movingUIState`.\n\n**Sources:** [public/style.css:768-788](), [public/script.js:767-788](), [public/scripts/RossAscends-mods.js:14]()\n\n## Chat Display Area\n\nThe `#chat` element is a vertically scrolling flex container that displays messages. Each message is a `.mes` block.\n\n### Message Block Structure\n\n```mermaid\ngraph TB\n    MesContainer[\".mes\u003cbr/\u003eIndividual message container\"]\n    \n    MesContainer --\u003e AvatarWrapper[\".mesAvatarWrapper\"]\n    MesContainer --\u003e MesBlock[\".mes_block\"]\n    \n    AvatarWrapper --\u003e Avatar[\".avatar\u003cbr/\u003eimg element\"]\n    \n    MesBlock --\u003e NameBlock[\".ch_name\u003cbr/\u003eCharacter name\"]\n    MesBlock --\u003e TextBlock[\".mes_text\u003cbr/\u003eMessage content\"]\n    MesBlock --\u003e Buttons[\"Message action buttons\u003cbr/\u003e.mes_buttons\"]\n    \n    TextBlock --\u003e Bias[\".mes_bias\u003cbr/\u003ePrompt bias display\"]\n    TextBlock --\u003e Reasoning[\".mes_reasoning\u003cbr/\u003eModel reasoning\"]\n    \n    Buttons --\u003e Edit[\".mes_edit\"]\n    Buttons --\u003e Delete[\".mes_delete\"]\n    Buttons --\u003e Swipe[\"Swipe controls\u003cbr/\u003e.swipe_left, .swipe_right\"]\n    Buttons --\u003e More[\"Additional actions\"]\n```\n\n**Message Template:**\nThe base message structure is cloned from `#message_template .mes` for performance:\n\n```javascript\nconst messageTemplate = $('#message_template .mes');\n```\n\n**Message Classes:**\n- `.mes` - Base message container\n- `[is_user=\"true\"]` - User messages\n- `[is_system=\"true\"]` - System messages\n- `.last_mes` - Most recent message\n- `.swipe_right`, `.swipe_left` - Swipe navigation\n\n**Key CSS Attributes:**\n- Avatar styling controlled by `power_user.avatar_style` (round, rectangular, square)\n- Message padding adapts based on `power_user.chat_display` (default, bubbles, document)\n- Blur effects use `--SmartThemeUserMesBlurTintColor` and `--SmartThemeBotMesBlurTintColor`\n\n**Sources:** [public/script.js:418-420](), [public/style.css:361-680](), [public/index.html:message_template]()\n\n### Message Rendering Flow\n\n```mermaid\nsequenceDiagram\n    participant Script as script.js\n    participant ChatElement as #chat\n    participant Template as messageTemplate\n    participant DOMPurify as DOMPurify\n    participant Converter as showdown.Converter\n    \n    Script-\u003e\u003eScript: addOneMessage(mes)\n    Script-\u003e\u003eTemplate: Clone message template\n    Script-\u003e\u003eScript: Populate message data\n    Script-\u003e\u003eConverter: Convert markdown to HTML\n    Script-\u003e\u003eDOMPurify: Sanitize HTML\n    Script-\u003e\u003eTemplate: Set .mes_text content\n    Script-\u003e\u003eChatElement: Append message block\n    Script-\u003e\u003eScript: scrollChatToBottom()\n    Script-\u003e\u003eScript: eventSource.emit(MESSAGE_RENDERED)\n```\n\nThe `addOneMessage()` function handles message creation and appending. Markdown processing uses the `converter` instance (Showdown) configured in `reloadMarkdownProcessor()`.\n\n**Sources:** [public/script.js:492-510](), [public/script.js:418-420]()\n\n## Character Selection Panel\n\nThe character selection interface displays available characters and groups in a paginated grid:\n\n```mermaid\ngraph TB\n    Container[\"#rm_print_characters_block\u003cbr/\u003eCharacter list container\"]\n    Pagination[\"#rm_print_characters_pagination\u003cbr/\u003ePagination controls\"]\n    Filters[\"Tag filters\u003cbr/\u003e#rm_charListFilter\"]\n    \n    Container --\u003e CharBlocks[\".character_select\u003cbr/\u003eCharacter cards\"]\n    Container --\u003e GroupBlocks[\".group_select\u003cbr/\u003eGroup cards\"]\n    Container --\u003e TagBlocks[\".tag_view\u003cbr/\u003eTag folders\"]\n    Container --\u003e EmptyBlock[\"Empty state\"]\n    \n    CharBlocks --\u003e Avatar[\".avatar\"]\n    CharBlocks --\u003e Name[\".ch_name\"]\n    CharBlocks --\u003e Tags[\".tags\"]\n    CharBlocks --\u003e FavIcon[\".ch_fav_icon\"]\n    \n    Filters --\u003e SearchBar[\"Search input\"]\n    Filters --\u003e TagFilters[\"Tag checkboxes\"]\n    Filters --\u003e FavFilter[\"Favorites toggle\"]\n```\n\n**Character Card Template:**\nCharacter blocks are generated by `getCharacterBlock()`:\n\n```javascript\nconst template = $('#character_template .character_select').clone();\ntemplate.attr({ 'data-chid': id, 'id': `CharID${id}` });\n```\n\n**Key Functions:**\n- `printCharacters(fullRefresh)` - Main rendering function [public/script.js:943-1033]()\n- `getCharacterBlock(item, id)` - Creates character card DOM [public/script.js:887-933]()\n- `selectCharacterById(id)` - Switches active character [public/script.js:823-857]()\n- `getEntitiesList({ doFilter })` - Returns filtered character/group list\n\n**Pagination:**\nUses `pagination.js` library with custom template `PAGINATION_TEMPLATE`. Page size is stored in `accountStorage` with key `'Characters_PerPage'` (default 50).\n\n**Sources:** [public/script.js:943-1033](), [public/script.js:887-933](), [public/scripts/utils.js:28]()\n\n### Filtering System\n\nThe `entitiesFilter` is a `FilterHelper` instance that manages character filtering:\n\n```mermaid\ngraph LR\n    FilterHelper[\"FilterHelper\u003cbr/\u003eentitiesFilter\"]\n    \n    FilterHelper --\u003e SearchFilter[\"FILTER_TYPES.SEARCH\u003cbr/\u003eName/description\"]\n    FilterHelper --\u003e TagFilter[\"FILTER_TYPES.TAG\u003cbr/\u003eTag matching\"]\n    FilterHelper --\u003e FavFilter[\"FILTER_TYPES.FAV\u003cbr/\u003eFavorites only\"]\n    FilterHelper --\u003e FolderFilter[\"FILTER_TYPES.FOLDER\u003cbr/\u003eBogus folders\"]\n    \n    FilterHelper --\u003e Callback[\"printCharactersDebounced()\"]\n```\n\nFilter state is checked via:\n- `entitiesFilter.hasAnyFilter()` - Returns true if any filter is active\n- `entitiesFilter.getFilterData(type)` - Gets filter value for specific type\n\n**Sources:** [public/script.js:617](), [public/scripts/filters.js:FILTER_TYPES](), [public/script.js:943-1033]()\n\n## Send Form Components\n\nThe input area (`#send_form`) contains message input and action buttons:\n\n```mermaid\ngraph TB\n    FormSheld[\"#form_sheld\"]\n    SendForm[\"#send_form\u003cbr/\u003eInput controls\"]\n    \n    FormSheld --\u003e SendForm\n    FormSheld --\u003e QRButtons[\"Quick Reply buttons\"]\n    \n    SendForm --\u003e NonQR[\"#nonQRFormItems\"]\n    \n    NonQR --\u003e LeftForm[\"#leftSendForm\u003cbr/\u003eLeft-aligned buttons\"]\n    NonQR --\u003e SendTextarea[\"#send_textarea\u003cbr/\u003eMessage input\"]\n    NonQR --\u003e RightForm[\"#rightSendForm\u003cbr/\u003eRight-aligned buttons\"]\n    \n    LeftForm --\u003e AttachBtn[\"File attachment button\"]\n    LeftForm --\u003e ExtButtons[\"Extension buttons\"]\n    \n    RightForm --\u003e SendBtn[\"#send_but\u003cbr/\u003eSend button\"]\n    RightForm --\u003e ContinueBtn[\"#mes_continue\"]\n    RightForm --\u003e ImpersonateBtn[\"#mes_impersonate\"]\n    RightForm --\u003e StopBtn[\".mes_stop\u003cbr/\u003e(hidden by default)\"]\n```\n\n**Input Area Structure:**\n- `#send_textarea` - Main contenteditable textarea with auto-resize\n- `#leftSendForm`, `#rightSendForm` - Flex containers for action buttons\n- Button size: `--bottomFormBlockSize` (calculated from `--mainFontSize`)\n\n**Key Button IDs:**\n- `#send_but` - Triggers message send\n- `#mes_continue` - Continue last AI response\n- `#mes_impersonate` - Generate message as user\n- `.mes_stop` - Abort generation (shown during generation)\n\n**Form States:**\nThe form applies different classes based on state:\n- `.isExecutingCommandsFromChatInput` - STscript commands executing\n- `.script_paused` - Script execution paused\n- `.compact` - Compact mode (when `power_user.compact_input_area` enabled)\n\n**Sources:** [public/index.html:send_form](), [public/style.css:890-1014](), [public/script.js:form_sheld]()\n\n### Input Handling Flow\n\n```mermaid\nsequenceDiagram\n    participant User\n    participant Textarea as #send_textarea\n    participant Script as script.js\n    participant SlashCmd as SlashCommandParser\n    participant Generate as Generate()\n    \n    User-\u003e\u003eTextarea: Type message\n    Textarea-\u003e\u003eTextarea: Auto-resize\n    User-\u003e\u003eTextarea: Press Enter\n    Textarea-\u003e\u003eScript: Input event handler\n    Script-\u003e\u003eScript: Check send_on_enter setting\n    alt Contains slash command\n        Script-\u003e\u003eSlashCmd: executeSlashCommandsOnChatInput()\n        SlashCmd-\u003e\u003eSlashCmd: Parse and execute\n    else Regular message\n        Script-\u003e\u003eScript: addOneMessage(userMsg)\n        Script-\u003e\u003eGenerate: Trigger AI response\n    end\n    Generate-\u003e\u003eScript: Display response\n```\n\n**Key Functions:**\n- `Send_press()` - Main send handler (not shown in provided code but referenced)\n- `executeSlashCommandsOnChatInput()` - Processes STscript commands [public/scripts/slash-commands.js]()\n- `Generate()` - Triggers AI response generation\n\n**Sources:** [public/script.js:send_form handlers](), [public/scripts/slash-commands.js:COMMENT_NAME_DEFAULT]()\n\n## Right Menu System\n\nThe right menu is a multi-purpose panel that displays different content based on `menu_type`:\n\n```mermaid\ngraph TB\n    RightMenu[\"Right Menu Container\"]\n    \n    RightMenu --\u003e CharList[\"menu_type='characters'\u003cbr/\u003eCharacter selection\"]\n    RightMenu --\u003e CharEdit[\"menu_type='character_edit'\u003cbr/\u003eCharacter editor\"]\n    RightMenu --\u003e CharCreate[\"menu_type='create'\u003cbr/\u003eCharacter creation\"]\n    RightMenu --\u003e GroupEdit[\"menu_type='group_edit'\u003cbr/\u003eGroup editor\"]\n    RightMenu --\u003e GroupCreate[\"menu_type='group_create'\u003cbr/\u003eGroup creation\"]\n    \n    CharEdit --\u003e CharDetails[\"Character details form\"]\n    CharEdit --\u003e AdvancedSettings[\"Advanced settings\"]\n    CharEdit --\u003e ExtensionsData[\"Extension data\"]\n    \n    GroupEdit --\u003e MemberList[\"Group members list\"]\n    GroupEdit --\u003e ChatList[\"Group chats list\"]\n    GroupEdit --\u003e GroupSettings[\"Group settings\"]\n```\n\n**Menu Type Management:**\nThe `menu_type` variable determines which panel is displayed:\n\n```javascript\nexport let menu_type = ''; // Current menu type\n```\n\nTransitions between menus use `selectRightMenuWithAnimation()` which applies CSS transitions.\n\n**Key Menu Panels:**\n- **Characters panel**: Shows when no character/group is selected\n- **Character Edit**: Displays when `menu_type === 'character_edit'`\n- **Group Edit**: Displays when `menu_type === 'group_edit'`\n- **Create panel**: Character creation form\n\n**Panel Visibility Control:**\nEach panel has corresponding show/hide functions and CSS classes that control visibility based on `menu_type`.\n\n**Sources:** [public/script.js:526-537](), [public/script.js:menu_type](), [public/scripts/group-chats.js]()\n\n## Responsive Design and Mobile Considerations\n\nSillyTavern adapts to mobile devices through several mechanisms:\n\n```mermaid\ngraph TB\n    Responsive[\"Responsive System\"]\n    \n    Responsive --\u003e Detection[\"isMobile() detection\"]\n    Responsive --\u003e Viewport[\"Viewport units\u003cbr/\u003edvh, dvw\"]\n    Responsive --\u003e Gestures[\"Touch gesture support\"]\n    Responsive --\u003e Compact[\"Compact mode\"]\n    \n    Detection --\u003e MediaQuery[\"CSS media queries\"]\n    Detection --\u003e UserAgent[\"User agent detection\"]\n    \n    Gestures --\u003e Swipe[\"Swipe navigation\"]\n    Gestures --\u003e LongPress[\"Long press menus\"]\n    Gestures --\u003e PinchZoom[\"Avatar zoom\"]\n    \n    Compact --\u003e InputArea[\"Compact input area\"]\n    Compact --\u003e ButtonSize[\"Adjusted button sizes\"]\n```\n\n**Mobile Detection:**\nThe `isMobile()` function checks for mobile devices:\n\n```javascript\nexport function isMobile() {\n    // Returns true on mobile devices\n}\n```\n\n**Mobile-Specific Behaviors:**\n- Sortable delay: 750ms on mobile vs 50ms on desktop (via `getSortableDelay()`)\n- Touch event handling with `power_user.gestures` setting\n- Special CSS classes: `.PWA` for standalone mode\n- Different scroll behavior: `--doc-height` uses `dvh` units\n\n**Viewport Management:**\nThe application uses dynamic viewport units to handle mobile browser chrome:\n\n```css\nheight: 100dvh; /* Dynamic viewport height */\nmax-height: calc(100dvh - var(--topBarBlockSize) - 1px);\n```\n\n**Sources:** [public/scripts/RossAscends-mods.js:isMobile](), [public/scripts/utils.js:351-355](), [public/style.css:19-22]()\n\n## UI State Management\n\nUI state is managed through several global objects and localStorage:\n\n```mermaid\ngraph LR\n    State[\"UI State\"]\n    \n    State --\u003e PowerUser[\"power_user\u003cbr/\u003eUI preferences\"]\n    State --\u003e Settings[\"settings\u003cbr/\u003eGlobal app settings\"]\n    State --\u003e ChatMeta[\"chat_metadata\u003cbr/\u003ePer-chat state\"]\n    State --\u003e AccountStorage[\"accountStorage\u003cbr/\u003ePersistent KV store\"]\n    \n    PowerUser --\u003e FontScale[\"font_scale\"]\n    PowerUser --\u003e ChatWidth[\"chat_width\"]\n    PowerUser --\u003e AvatarStyle[\"avatar_style\"]\n    PowerUser --\u003e MovingUI[\"movingUI state\"]\n    \n    AccountStorage --\u003e PerPage[\"Characters_PerPage\"]\n    AccountStorage --\u003e TagSettings[\"Tag preferences\"]\n    AccountStorage --\u003e SortOrder[\"Sort preferences\"]\n```\n\n**Key State Objects:**\n- `power_user` - User interface preferences, loaded from `settings.json` [public/scripts/power-user.js:123-350]()\n- `chat_metadata` - Per-conversation metadata [public/script.js:424-425]()\n- `accountStorage` - Browser-based persistent storage [public/scripts/util/AccountStorage.js]()\n\n**State Persistence:**\n- `saveSettingsDebounced()` - Debounced settings save [public/script.js:441]()\n- `saveSettings()` - Immediate settings save\n- Auto-save on input changes with configurable debounce timeout\n\n**Sources:** [public/scripts/power-user.js:123-350](), [public/script.js:424-425](), [public/scripts/util/AccountStorage.js]()\n\n## Animation and Transitions\n\nThe UI uses CSS animations controlled by JavaScript variables:\n\n**Animation Duration Control:**\n```javascript\nexport let animation_duration = ANIMATION_DURATION_DEFAULT; // 125ms\n```\n\nSet via `setAnimationDuration(ms)` which updates the CSS variable:\n\n```css\n--animation-duration: 125ms; /* Configurable */\n```\n\n**Reduced Motion:**\nWhen `power_user.reduced_motion` is enabled, `jQuery.fx.off` is set to `true`, disabling jQuery animations and setting duration to 0.\n\n**Key Animated Elements:**\n- Menu transitions: Slide in/out with `animation_easing`\n- Message fade-in: `.text_segment` uses `fade-in` animation\n- Swipe navigation: Horizontal slide transitions\n- Drawer expansion: Height transitions with `getSlideToggleOptions()`\n\n**Sources:** [public/script.js:568-570](), [public/style.css:128-132](), [public/scripts/power-user.js:518-524]()\n\n## Summary Table: Key UI Elements\n\n| Element ID | Component Type | Primary Function | Parent Container |\n|------------|---------------|------------------|------------------|\n| `#top-bar` | Fixed header | Global navigation, status | `body` |\n| `#sheld` | Main container | Chat window frame | `body` |\n| `#chat` | Scrollable list | Message display area | `#sheld` |\n| `#send_form` | Input group | Message composition | `#form_sheld` |\n| `#send_textarea` | Textarea | Message input field | `#send_form` |\n| `#rm_print_characters_block` | Grid container | Character/group list | Right menu |\n| `.mes` | Message block | Individual message | `#chat` |\n| `.character_select` | Card component | Character card | Character list |\n| `#ai-config-button` | Drawer | AI settings panel | `#top-settings-holder` |\n| `.mes_buttons` | Button group | Message actions | `.mes_block` |\n\n**Sources:**
