[public/css/backgrounds.css:87-93](), [public/scripts/backgrounds.js:142-178](), [public/scripts/backgrounds.js:184-194]()\n\n### Thumbnail Elements and States\n\nEach thumbnail element includes multiple visual states:\n\n| State | CSS Class | Visual Indicator |\n|-------|-----------|------------------|\n| Selected | `.selected-background` | White outline + checkmark (top-left) |\n| Locked | `.locked-background` | Golden outline + lock icon (bottom-right) |\n| Hovered | `:hover` | Visible menu buttons + title |\n| Focused | `:focus-visible` | Outline color change |\n\n**Sources:** [public/css/backgrounds.css:133-175]()\n\n---\n\n## Background Selection and Locking\n\n### Lock/Unlock Mechanism\n\nThe background locking system allows users to override the global background for specific chats:\n\n```mermaid\nstateDiagram-v2\n    [*] --\u003e GlobalBackground: No chat selected\n    GlobalBackground --\u003e GlobalBackground: Select different background\n    \n    GlobalBackground --\u003e LockedBackground: Lock background (onLockBackgroundClick)\n    LockedBackground --\u003e LockedBackground: Select chat-specific background\n    LockedBackground --\u003e GlobalBackground: Unlock background (onUnlockBackgroundClick)\n    \n    note right of LockedBackground\n        chat_metadata[BG_METADATA_KEY] = url\n        #bg1 shows locked background\n    end note\n    \n    note right of GlobalBackground\n        background_settings.url used\n        #bg1 shows global background\n    end note\n```\n\n**Sources:** [public/scripts/backgrounds.js:273-320]()\n\n### Background Selection Logic\n\n```javascript\n// Simplified selection logic from onSelectBackgroundClick\nfunction onSelectBackgroundClick(e) {\n    const bgFile = $(this).attr('bgfile');\n    const isCustom = $(this).attr('custom') === 'true';\n    const backgroundCssUrl = getUrlParameter(this);\n    const bypassGlobalLock = !isCustom \u0026\u0026 e.shiftKey;\n    \n    if ((isChatBackgroundLocked() || isCustom) \u0026\u0026 !bypassGlobalLock) {\n        // Update locked background directly\n        saveBackgroundMetadata(backgroundCssUrl);\n        $('#bg1').css('background-image', backgroundCssUrl);\n    } else {\n        // Update global background setting\n        setBackground(bgFile, backgroundCssUrl);\n    }\n}\n```\n\n**Sources:** [public/scripts/backgrounds.js:327-345]()\n\n| Action | Shift Key | Current State | Result |\n|--------|-----------|---------------|--------|\n| Click system background | No | Unlocked | Sets global background |\n| Click system background | No | Locked | Sets locked background |\n| Click system background | Yes | Locked | Sets global background (bypass) |\n| Click chat background | No | Any | Sets locked background |\n\n**Sources:** [public/scripts/backgrounds.js:332]()\n\n---\n\n## Lazy Loading and Thumbnail Generation\n\n### Intersection Observer Implementation\n\nThe system uses a global `IntersectionObserver` to lazy-load background thumbnails only when they enter the viewport:\n\n```mermaid\nsequenceDiagram\n    participant Grid as \"Background Grid\"\n    participant Observer as \"lazyLoadObserver\"\n    participant Elem as \".lazy-load-background\"\n    participant Cache as \"getThumbnailFromStorage()\"\n    participant DOM as \"Element Style\"\n    \n    Grid-\u003e\u003eObserver: Initialize with callback\n    Note over Observer: rootMargin: '50px'\u003cbr/\u003ethreshold: 0.01\n    \n    Grid-\u003e\u003eObserver: observe(thumbnail)\n    \n    Observer-\u003e\u003eObserver: Element enters viewport\n    Observer-\u003e\u003eElem: Check if already loaded\n    \n    alt Not loaded\n        Observer-\u003e\u003eCache: Request thumbnail\n        Cache--\u003e\u003eObserver: Blob URL\n        Observer-\u003e\u003eDOM: Set background-image\n        Observer-\u003e\u003eElem: Mark as loaded\n        Observer-\u003e\u003eObserver: unobserve(thumbnail)\n    end\n```\n\n**Sources:** [public/scripts/backgrounds.js:86](), [public/scripts/backgrounds.js:659-697]()\n\n### Thumbnail Creation Process\n\n```mermaid\ngraph TB\n    subgraph \"Thumbnail Creation Flow\"\n        Create[\"createThumbnailElement(imageData)\"]\n        Template[\"#background_template .bg_example\"]\n        Clipper[\"Create .thumbnail-clipper\"]\n        Placeholder[\"Set placeholder:\u003cbr/\u003e- backgroundColor = dominantColor\u003cbr/\u003e- backgroundImage = PNG_PIXEL\"]\n        \n        Create --\u003e Template\n        Template --\u003e Clipper\n        Clipper --\u003e Placeholder\n    end\n    \n    subgraph \"Metadata Application\"\n        MetaKey[\"Generate metadata key\"]\n        MetaLookup[\"METADATA_CACHE.get(key)\"]\n        ApplyColor[\"Apply dominantColor\"]\n        ApplyAspect[\"Apply aspectRatio\"]\n        \n        Create --\u003e MetaKey\n        MetaKey --\u003e MetaLookup\n        MetaLookup --\u003e ApplyColor\n        MetaLookup --\u003e ApplyAspect\n    end\n    \n    subgraph \"Lazy Load Setup\"\n        AddClass[\"Add .lazy-load-background\"]\n        Observe[\"lazyLoadObserver.observe()\"]\n        \n        Placeholder --\u003e AddClass\n        AddClass --\u003e Observe\n    end\n```\n\n**Sources:** [public/scripts/backgrounds.js:142-178]()\n\n### Placeholder System\n\nBefore thumbnails load, placeholders provide visual feedback:\n\n| Placeholder Type | Source | Purpose |\n|-----------------|--------|---------|\n| Transparent PNG | `PNG_PIXEL` constant | Initial background while loading |\n| Dominant Color | `METADATA_CACHE` | Background color extracted from image |\n| Aspect Ratio | `METADATA_CACHE` | Maintains correct proportions during load |\n\n**Sources:** [public/scripts/backgrounds.js:18-20](), [public/scripts/backgrounds.js:154-162]()\n\n---\n\n## Background Fitting Modes\n\nThe background system supports multiple fitting modes that control how images are displayed:\n\n### Fitting Mode Classes\n\n```mermaid\ngraph TB\n    subgraph \"Fitting Modes\"\n        Classic[\"#bg1.classic\u003cbr/\u003e(default)\"]\n        Cover[\"#bg1.cover\"]\n        Contain[\"#bg1.contain\"]\n        Stretch[\"#bg1.stretch\"]\n        Center[\"#bg1.center\"]\n    end\n    \n    subgraph \"CSS Properties\"\n        ClassicCSS[\"background-size: cover\u003cbr/\u003ebackground-position: center\"]\n        CoverCSS[\"background-size: cover\u003cbr/\u003ebackground-position: center\"]\n        ContainCSS[\"background-size: contain\u003cbr/\u003ebackground-position: center\u003cbr/\u003ebackground-repeat: no-repeat\"]\n        StretchCSS[\"background-size: 100% 100%\"]\n        CenterCSS[\"background-size: auto\u003cbr/\u003ebackground-position: center\u003cbr/\u003ebackground-repeat: no-repeat\"]\n    end\n    \n    Classic --\u003e ClassicCSS\n    Cover --\u003e CoverCSS\n    Contain --\u003e ContainCSS\n    Stretch --\u003e StretchCSS\n    Center --\u003e CenterCSS\n```\n\n**Sources:** [public/css/backgrounds.css:1-41]()\n\n### Fitting Mode Behavior\n\n| Mode | Behavior | Use Case |\n|------|----------|----------|\n| Classic / Cover | Scales to fill viewport, maintains aspect ratio, crops overflow | Default, wallpaper-style backgrounds |\n| Contain | Shows entire image, maintains aspect ratio, adds letterboxing if needed | Viewing full artwork without cropping |\n| Stretch | Stretches to fill viewport, distorts aspect ratio | Patterns or abstract backgrounds |\n| Center | Centers without scaling | Large images viewed at native resolution |\n\nThe fitting mode is stored in `background_settings.fitting` and applied via `setFittingClass()`:\n\n**Sources:** [public/scripts/backgrounds.js:95-101](), [public/scripts/backgrounds.js:821-831]()\n\n---\n\n## Background Sorting and Filtering\n\n### Sort Options\n\n```mermaid\ngraph TB\n    subgraph \"Sort Options\"\n        AZ[\"BG_SORT_OPTIONS.AZ\u003cbr/\u003e'az'\u003cbr/\u003eAlphabetical ascending\"]\n        ZA[\"BG_SORT_OPTIONS.ZA\u003cbr/\u003e'za'\u003cbr/\u003eAlphabetical descending\"]\n        Newest[\"BG_SORT_OPTIONS.NEWEST\u003cbr/\u003e'newest'\u003cbr/\u003eMost recent first\"]\n isCustom)\"]\n        MetaLookup[\"METADATA_CACHE.get(key)\"]\n        Timestamp[\"metadata.addedTimestamp\"]\n    end\n    \n    AZ --\u003e SortFunc\n    ZA --\u003e SortFunc\n    Newest --\u003e SortFunc\n    Oldest --\u003e SortFunc\n    \n    Newest --\u003e MetaLookup\n    Oldest --\u003e MetaLookup\n    MetaLookup --\u003e Timestamp\n```\n\n**Sources:** [public/scripts/backgrounds.js:62-70](), [public/scripts/backgrounds.js:109-135]()\n\n### Filter System\n\nThe background drawer includes a text filter that searches both global and chat-specific backgrounds:\n\n```javascript\n// Filter backgrounds by search term\nfunction filterBackgrounds(backgrounds, searchTerm) {\n    if (!searchTerm) return backgrounds;\n    \n    const fuse = new Fuse(backgrounds, {\n        keys: ['filename'],\n        threshold: 0.3,\n    });\n    \n    return fuse.search(searchTerm).map(result =\u003e result.item);\n}\n```\n\n**Sources:** [public/scripts/backgrounds.js:735-762]()\n\n---\n\n---\n\n## Theming System Architecture\n\n### CSS Custom Properties System\n\nSillyTavern uses CSS custom properties (CSS variables) prefixed with `--SmartTheme*` for theming. These variables are defined globally and referenced throughout the application for consistent styling.\n\n**Core Theme Variables**\n\n| Variable | Purpose | Example Usage |\n|----------|---------|---------------|\n| `--SmartThemeBlurTintColor` | Semi-transparent overlay background | Drawer backgrounds, modal overlays |\n| `--SmartThemeBorderColor` | Border colors | All borders, outlines |\n| `--SmartThemeBodyColor` | Primary text color | All text elements |\n| `--SmartThemeShadowColor` | Shadow colors | Text shadows, box shadows |\n| `--SmartThemeBlurStrength` | Backdrop blur intensity (numeric) | `backdrop-filter: blur(calc(var(--SmartThemeBlurStrength) * 2))` |\n| `--SmartThemeQuoteColor` | Accent/highlight color | Active states, selected items |\n| `--SmartThemeBotMesBlurTintColor` | Bot message background | Chat messages from AI |\n| `--SmartThemeUserMesBlurTintColor` | User message background | Chat messages from user |\n\n**Additional Theme Variables**\n\n| Variable | Purpose |\n|----------|---------|\n| `--mainFontSize` | Base font size for all text |\n| `--mainFontFamily` | Primary font stack |\n| `--monoFontFamily` | Monospace font for code |\n| `--topBarBlockSize` | Height of top navigation bar |\n| `--avatar-base-width`, `--avatar-base-height` | Standard avatar dimensions |\n| `--avatar-base-border-radius` | Avatar corner rounding |\n| `--animation-duration`, `--animation-duration-2x`, `--animation-duration-3x` | Standard transition durations |\n\n**Sources:** [public/css/backgrounds.css:56](), [public/css/select2-overrides.css:3-14](), [public/css/toggle-dependent.css:1-5]()\n\n### UI Mode Toggles\n\nThe `toggle-dependent.css` file defines visual modes controlled by body classes. These classes enable/disable entire visual feature sets.\n\n**Avatar Display Modes**\n\n```mermaid\ngraph TB\n    subgraph \"Avatar Mode Classes\"\n        BigAvatars[\"body.big-avatars\"]\n        SquareAvatars[\"body.square-avatars\"]\n        RoundedAvatars[\"body.rounded-avatars\"]\n        HideChatAvatars[\"body.hideChatAvatars\"]\n    end\n    \n    subgraph \"Avatar Styling Effects\"\n        BigCSS[\"--big-avatar-width-factor: 1.2\u003cbr/\u003e--big-avatar-height-factor: 1.8\u003cbr/\u003eApplies to .avatar\"]\n        SquareCSS[\"border-radius: var(--avatar-base-border-radius)\"]\n        RoundedCSS[\"border-radius: var(--avatar-base-border-radius-rounded)\"]\n        HideCSS[\".mesAvatarWrapper .avatar { display: none !important }\"]\n    end\n    \n    BigAvatars --\u003e BigCSS\n    SquareAvatars --\u003e SquareCSS\n    RoundedAvatars --\u003e RoundedCSS\n    HideChatAvatars --\u003e HideCSS\n```\n\n**Sources:** [public/css/toggle-dependent.css:1-263]()\n\n**Chat Display Modes**\n\n| Body Class | Effect | CSS Selectors Affected |\n|------------|--------|------------------------|\n| `body.charListGrid` | Grid view for character list | `#rm_print_characters_block` |\n| `body.bubblechat` | Chat bubble styling | `.mes` elements |\n| `body.documentstyle` | Document-style layout (minimal chrome) | `.mes`, `.mesAvatarWrapper`, `.ch_name` |\n| `body.waifuMode` | Visual novel layout | `#sheld`, `#expression-wrapper`, `.zoomed_avatar` |\n\n**Sources:** [public/css/toggle-dependent.css:60-465]()\n\n**Visual Effects Modes**\n\n| Body Class | Effect | Purpose |\n|------------|--------|---------|\n| `body.no-blur` | Removes all backdrop filters | Performance optimization |\n| `body.noShadows` | Removes text shadows | Accessibility/readability |\n| `body.movingUI` | Enables resize handles | Customizable UI layout |\n\n**Sources:** [public/css/toggle-dependent.css:366-456]()\n\n### Dynamic Focus Style Generation\n\nThe `dynamic-styles.js` module automatically generates `:focus-visible` styles from existing `:hover` styles to ensure keyboard accessibility.\n\n**Title:** Dynamic Focus Style Generation Process\n\n```mermaid\nsequenceDiagram\n    participant Browser\n    participant Observer as \"MutationObserver\"\n    participant DynStyles as \"dynamic-styles.js\"\n    participant StyleSheet as \"CSSStyleSheet\"\n    participant DynSheet as \"#dynamic-styles\"\n    \n    Browser-\u003e\u003eObserver: Stylesheet added to \u003chead\u003e\n    Observer-\u003e\u003eDynStyles: applyDynamicFocusStyles(sheet)\n    \n    DynStyles-\u003e\u003eStyleSheet: processRules(cssRules)\n    \n    loop For each rule\n        StyleSheet-\u003e\u003eDynStyles: Check for :hover selector\n        DynStyles-\u003e\u003eDynStyles: Check if :focus* already exists\n        \n        alt No focus style exists\n            DynStyles-\u003e\u003eDynSheet: insertRule(\":focus-visible { ... }\")\n        end\n    end\n    \n    Note over DynSheet: Generated focus styles\u003cbr/\u003emirror hover styles\n```\n\n**Sources:** [public/scripts/dynamic-styles.js:1-199]()\n\n**Focus Style Algorithm**\n\nThe system:\n1. Scans all stylesheets for rules containing `:hover`\n2. Extracts base selector by replacing `:hover` with placeholder\n3. Checks if corresponding `:focus`, `:focus-within`, or `:focus-visible` rule exists\n4. If not, creates `:focus-visible` rule with same properties as `:hover`\n5. Preserves `@media`, `@supports`, and `@container` wrappers\n\n**Sources:** [public/scripts/dynamic-styles.js:35-151]()\n\n### Background Integration with Theming\n\n**Title:** Background System Theme Integration\n\n```mermaid\ngraph TB\n    subgraph \"Background Element\"\n        BG1[\"#bg1\"]\n        BgImage[\"background-image: url(...)\"]\n        BgFitting[\"CSS class: .cover/.contain/.stretch/.center\"]\n        BgTransition[\"transition: background-image var(--animation-duration-3x)\"]\n    end\n    \n    subgraph \"Theme Variables Used\"\n        AnimDuration[\"--animation-duration-3x\"]\n        BlurStrength[\"--SmartThemeBlurStrength\"]\n        BlurTint[\"--SmartThemeBlurTintColor\"]\n        BorderColor[\"--SmartThemeBorderColor\"]\n    end\n    \n    subgraph \"UI Overlays\"\n        Chat[\"#chat\"]\n        TopBar[\"#top-bar\"]\n        SendForm[\"#send_form\"]\n        Drawers[\".drawer-content\"]\n    end\n    \n    AnimDuration --\u003e BgTransition\n    BG1 --\u003e BgImage\n    BG1 --\u003e BgFitting\n    \n    BG1 -.-\u003e|\"visible through\"| Chat\n    BG1 -.-\u003e|\"visible through\"| TopBar\n    BG1 -.-\u003e|\"visible through\"| SendForm\n    BG1 -.-\u003e|\"visible through\"| Drawers\n    \n    BlurStrength --\u003e Chat\n    BlurTint --\u003e Chat\n    BorderColor --\u003e Chat\n```\n\n**Sources:** [public/css/backgrounds.css:1-11](), [public/scripts/backgrounds.js:95-101]()\n\n**Fitting Mode Implementation**\n\n```javascript\n// setFittingClass implementation from backgrounds.js\nfunction setFittingClass(fitting) {\n    $('#bg1').removeClass('cover contain stretch center');\n    if (fitting) {\n        $('#bg1').addClass(fitting);\n    }\n}\n```\n\nEach fitting mode is implemented as a CSS class on `#bg1`:\n\n| Class | CSS Properties | Behavior |\n|-------|----------------|----------|\n| `.cover` | `background-size: cover` | Fills viewport, maintains aspect, crops |\n| `.contain` | `background-size: contain; background-repeat: no-repeat` | Shows entire image, letterboxes if needed |\n| `.stretch` | `background-size: 100% 100%` | Stretches to fill, distorts aspect |\n| `.center` | `background-size: auto; background-position: center` | Native size, centered |\n\n**Sources:** [public/css/backgrounds.css:18-41](), [public/scripts/backgrounds.js:821-831]()\n\n---\n\n## Background Management Operations\n\n### Upload and Creation\n\n```mermaid\nsequenceDiagram\n    participant User\n    participant UI as \"File Input\"\n    participant BGScript as \"backgrounds.js\"\n    participant Crop as \"Crop Dialog\"\n    participant Server as \"/api/backgrounds/upload\"\n    participant FS as \"File System\"\n    \n Save background file\n    Server--\u003e\u003eBGScript: {path: filename}\n    \n    BGScript-\u003e\u003eBGScript: getBackgrounds()\n    BGScript-\u003e\u003eUI: Refresh background list\n [public/scripts/backgrounds.js:455-478](), [public/scripts/backgrounds.js:480-546]()\n\n### Copy to System Backgrounds\n\nChat-specific backgrounds can be promoted to system 3\u003cbr/\u003e(vs 5 on desktop)\"]\n        MenuToggle[\".mobile-only-menu-toggle\u003cbr/\u003eVisible on mobile\"]\n        HoverMenu[\".jg-menu\u003cbr/\u003eHidden by default\"]\n        TapOpen[\"Tap toggle → .mobile-menu-open\"]\n    end\n    \n    subgraph \"Responsive Breakpoints\"\n        Max1000[\"@media (max-width: 1000px)\"]\n        Max480[\"@media (max-width: 480px)\"]\n    end\n    \n    Max1000 --\u003e GridCols\n    Max1000 --\u003e MenuToggle\n    Max1000 --\u003e TapOpen\n```\n\n**Sources:** [public/css/mobile-styles.css:36-108]()\n\n### Mobile Thumbnail Interactions\n\nOn mobile devices, the hover-based menu system is replaced with tap-to-open:\n\n1. Thumbnail displays a toggle button (three dots)\n2. Tapping toggle adds `.mobile-menu-open` class\n3. Menu becomes visible and functional\n4. Tapping outside closes menu\n\n**Sources:** [public/css/mobile-styles.css:69-84]()\n\n---\n\n## Performance Considerations\n\n### Optimization Strategies\n\n```mermaid\ngraph TB\n    subgraph \"Performance Features\"\n        LazyLoad[\"Lazy Loading\u003cbr/\u003eIntersectionObserver\"]\n        ThumbCache[\"Thumbnail Caching\u003cbr/\u003eLocalForage\"]\n        BlobCache[\"Blob URL Cache\u003cbr/\u003eIn-memory Map\"]\n        MetaCache[\"Metadata Cache\u003cbr/\u003eDominant colors, ratios\"]\n        Debounce[\"Debounced Operations\u003cbr/\u003eSearch, sort\"]\n    end\n    \n    subgraph \"Benefits\"\n        LazyLoad --\u003e ReduceLoad[\"Reduces initial load time\"]\n        ThumbCache --\u003e ReduceFetch[\"Avoids redundant fetches\"]\n        BlobCache --\u003e FastAccess[\"Fast repeated access\"]\n        MetaCache --\u003e InstantPlaceholder[\"Instant placeholders\"]\n        Debounce --\u003e ReduceRerender[\"Reduces re-renders\"]\n    end\n```\n\n**Sources:** [public/scripts/backgrounds.js:31-48](), [public/scripts/backgrounds.js:86](), [public/scripts/backgrounds.js:383-418]()\n\n### Thumbnail Generation Details\n\nThumbnails are generated client-side to reduce server load:\n\n1. Fetch full image from server (cached by browser)\n2. Create 160×90 thumbnail using canvas\n3. Store compressed thumbnail in IndexedDB\n4. Reuse thumbnail from storage on subsequent loads\n\n**Sources:** [public/scripts/backgrounds.js:383-418]()\n\n---\n\n## Event System Integration\n\n### Background Change Events\n\n```mermaid\nsequenceDiagram\n    participant ChatSys as \"Chat System\"\n    participant Events as \"eventSource\"\n    participant BGSys as \"backgrounds.js\"\n    participant DOM as \"#bg1\"\n    \n    ChatSys-\u003e\u003eEvents: event_types.CHAT_CHANGED\n    Events-\u003e\u003eBGSys: onChatChanged()\n    \n    BGSys-\u003e\u003eBGSys: Check chat_metadata[BG_METADATA_KEY]\n    \n    alt Has locked background\n        BGSys-\u003e\u003eDOM: Set locked background\n    else No locked background\n        BGSys-\u003e\u003eDOM: Set global background\n    end\n    \n    BGSys-\u003e\u003eBGSys: renderChatBackgrounds()\n    BGSys-\u003e\u003eBGSys: highlightLockedBackground()\n    BGSys-\u003e\u003eBGSys: highlightSelectedBackground()\n```\n\n**Sources:** [public/scripts/backgrounds.js:247-255]()\n\n### Event Listeners\n\nThe background system registers several event listeners:\n\n| Event | Element | Handler | Purpose |\n|-------|---------|---------|---------|\n| `click` | `.bg_example` | `onSelectBackgroundClick` | Select background |\n| `click` | `.jg-lock` | `onLockBackgroundClick` | Lock background to chat |\n| `click` | `.jg-unlock` | `onUnlockBackgroundClick` | Unlock chat background |\n| `click` | `.jg-delete` | `onDeleteBackgroundClick` | Delete background |\n| `click` | `.jg-edit` | `onRenameBackgroundClick` | Rename background |\n| `change` | `#background_fitting` | `setFittingClass` | Change fitting mode |\n| `input` | `#bg-filter` | `filterBackgrounds` | Filter by search term |\n| `change` | `#bg-sort` | `sortBackgrounds` | Change sort order |\n\n**Sources:**
