|\n\nSources: [src/endpoints/content-manager.js](), [src/endpoints/thumbnails.js](), [default/config.yaml:183-194]()\n\n---\n\n## World Info (Lorebook) Storage\n\n### World Info File Format\n\nWorld Info (Lorebook) data is stored as separate JSON files in the `worlds/` directory.\n\n**World Info Structure**\n\n```mermaid\ngraph TB\n    WorldFile[\"worldinfo_name.json\"]\n    \n    WorldFile --\u003e Entries[\"entries: object\\n{uid: entry}\"]\n    WorldFile --\u003e Metadata[\"metadata:\\n- name\\n- version\"]\n    \n    Entries --\u003e Entry1[\"Entry Object:\\n- uid\\n- key (array)\\n- keysecondary (array)\\n- content\\n- enabled\\n- position\\n- depth\\n- selectiveLogic\"]\n    \n    Entry1 --\u003e Keys[\"Primary Keys:\\nActivation terms\"]\n    Entry1 --\u003e SecondaryKeys[\"Secondary Keys:\\nLogical filtering\"]\n    Entry1 --\u003e Content[\"Content:\\nInjected text\"]\n    Entry1 --\u003e Activation[\"Activation:\\n- constant\\n- sticky\\n- cooldown\\n- delay\"]\n```\n\n**Storage Locations**\n\n| Type | Location | Purpose |\n|------|----------|---------|\n| **Global WI** | `DATA_ROOT/{handle}/worlds/{name}.json` | Reusable across characters |\n| **Character WI** | Embedded in character card JSON | Character-specific lore |\n| **Chat WI** | `chat_metadata.world_info` | Temporary chat additions |\n\n**World Info Entry Format**\n\nEach entry in a World Info file has this structure [public/scripts/world-info.js:102-183]():\n\n```javascript\n{\n  \"uid\": number,\n  \"key\": string[],           // Primary activation keys\n  \"keysecondary\": string[],  // Secondary logic keys\n  \"comment\": string,\n  \"content\": string,         // Text to inject\n  \"constant\": boolean,       // Always active\n  \"selective\": boolean,      // Use secondary keys\n  \"selectiveLogic\": number,  // AND_ANY, NOT_ALL, etc.\n  \"order\": number,\n  \"position\": number,        // Injection position\n  \"disable\": boolean,\n  \"probability\": number,\n  \"depth\": number,          // Scan depth\n  \"sticky\": number,         // Sticky duration\n  \"cooldown\": number,       // Cooldown duration\n  \"delay\": number          // Activation delay\n}\n```\n\n**World Info Save Operation**\n\n```mermaid\nsequenceDiagram\n    participant Client\n    participant SaveEndpoint as \"/api/worldinfo/save\"\n    participant Debounce as \"saveWorldDebounced\"\n    participant FS as \"File System\"\n    \n    Client-\u003e\u003eSaveEndpoint: POST world data\n    SaveEndpoint-\u003e\u003eDebounce: Queue save operation\n    Note over Debounce: Debounce timeout:\\n1000ms (relaxed)\n    Debounce-\u003e\u003eFS: Atomic write to worlds/{name}.json\n    FS--\u003e\u003eDebounce: Success\n    Debounce--\u003e\u003eClient: Async completion\n```\n\nSources: [public/scripts/world-info.js:83-100](), [public/scripts/world-info.js:102-183](), [src/endpoints/worldinfo.js]()\n\n---\n\n## Data Integrity and Validation\n\n### Integrity Mechanisms\n\n**Chat Integrity UUID**\n\nEach chat file contains a unique integrity UUID [src/endpoints/chats.js]() in the metadata header:\n\n```javascript\nif (!metadata.integrity) {\n    metadata.integrity = uuidv4();\n}\n```\n\nThis UUID is checked on load if `checkIntegrity` is enabled to detect:\n- File corruption\n- Incomplete writes\n- Manual tampering\n\n**Character Card Validation**\n\nImported character cards are validated using `TavernCardValidator` [src/validator/TavernCardValidator.js]() which checks:\n- Required fields (name, description)\n- Field types and formats\n- Spec version compatibility\n- Extension data structure\n\n**Validation Flow**\n\n```mermaid\ngraph TB\n    LoadData[\"Load Data File\"]\n    \n    LoadData --\u003e ParseJSON{\"Parse JSON\"}\n    ParseJSON --\u003e|Error| ReportError[\"Report Parse Error\"]\n    ParseJSON --\u003e|Success| ValidateSchema[\"Validate Against Schema\"]\n    \n    ValidateSchema --\u003e CheckRequired[\"Check Required Fields\"]\n    CheckRequired --\u003e CheckTypes[\"Check Field Types\"]\n    CheckTypes --\u003e CheckExtensions[\"Validate Extensions\"]\n    \n    CheckExtensions --\u003e Valid{\"Valid?\"}\n    Valid --\u003e|Yes| Accept[\"Accept Data\"]\n    Valid --\u003e|No| Reject[\"Reject with Errors\"]\n```\n\n**Backup Integrity Checks**\n\nBefore creating backups [src/endpoints/chats.js:28](), the system can verify:\n- Chat file is well-formed JSONL\n- All lines parse as valid JSON\n- Metadata header is present\n- Message structure is valid\n\nSources: [src/endpoints/chats.js:28](), [src/validator/TavernCardValidator.js](), [public/script.js]() (uuidv4)\n\n---\n\n## Configuration Management\n\n### Server Configuration\n\nSillyTavern uses a YAML configuration file for server-wide settings.\n\n**Configuration File**: `config.yaml` (resolved from command line or default location)\n\n**Configuration Loading**\n\n```mermaid\ngraph TB\n    StartServer[\"Server Startup\"]\n    \n    StartServer --\u003e ParseArgs[\"CommandLineParser.parse()\"]\n    ParseArgs --\u003e SetPath[\"setConfigFilePath(path)\"]\n    SetPath --\u003e ReadFile[\"Read config.yaml\"]\n    ReadFile --\u003e ParseYAML[\"yaml.parse()\"]\n    ParseYAML --\u003e Cache[\"Store in CACHED_CONFIG\"]\n    Cache --\u003e GlobalSet[\"Set globalThis.DATA_ROOT\"]\n    \n    ReadFile --\u003e CheckExists{\"File\\nexists?\"}\n    CheckExists --\u003e|No| Exit[\"Exit with error\"]\n    CheckExists --\u003e|Yes| ParseYAML\n    \n    ParseYAML --\u003e ParseError{\"Parse\\nerror?\"}\n    ParseError --\u003e|Yes| Exit\n    ParseError --\u003e|No| Cache\n```\n\n**Configuration Access**\n\nConfiguration values are accessed via `getConfigValue(key, default, type)` [src/util.js:88-109]():\n\n1. Check environment variable `SILLYTAVERN_{KEY}`\n2. Check config.yaml using lodash `_.get(config, key)`\n3. Return default if not found\n4. Convert type if specified\n\n**Data-Related Configuration**\n\n| Key | Default | Purpose |\n|-----|---------|---------|\n| `dataRoot` | `./data` | Root directory for all user data |\n| `backups.chat.enabled` | `true` | Enable chat backup system |\n| `backups.chat.maxTotalBackups` | `-1` | Max backup files (-1 = unlimited) |\n| `backups.common.numberOfBackups` | `50` | Backups per chat file |\n| `performance.memoryCacheCapacity` | `'100mb'` | Memory cache size limit |\n| `performance.useDiskCache` | `true` | Enable disk caching |\n| `performance.lazyLoadCharacters` | `false` | Load character data on-demand |\n| `thumbnails.enabled` | `true` | Generate thumbnails |\n\nSources: [src/util.js:28-109](), [src/command-line.js](), [default/config.yaml](), [post-install.js]()\n\n---\n\n## Performance Optimization Strategies\n\n### Lazy Loading Characters\n\nWhen `lazyLoadCharacters` is enabled [default/config.yaml:199](), character data is loaded on-demand rather than at startup.\n\n**Lazy Load Strategy**\n\n```mermaid\ngraph TB\n    Request[\"Character List Request\"]\n    \n    Request --\u003e Mode{\"Lazy Load\\nEnabled?\"}\n    \n    Mode --\u003e|Yes| ShallowLoad[\"Load Shallow Data:\\n- name\\n- avatar filename\\n- basic metadata\"]\n    Mode --\u003e|No| FullLoad[\"Load Full Data:\\n- Parse all PNG files\\n- Load complete JSON\"]\n    \n    ShallowLoad --\u003e Return[\"Return Character List\"]\n    FullLoad --\u003e Return\n    \n    Return --\u003e UserSelect[\"User Selects Character\"]\n    UserSelect --\u003e FullLoadChar[\"Load Complete Character Data\\nfor selected character only\"]\n```\n\n**Shallow Character Data**\n\nShallow loading reads only essential metadata without parsing the full PNG:\n- Character name\n- Avatar filename\n- Favorite status\n- Creation date\n\nFull data is loaded only when:\n- Character is selected for chat\n- Character is opened for editing\n- Character data is explicitly needed\n\n### Memory Management\n\n**Memory Limits**\n\nThe `MemoryLimitedMap` class [src/util.js]() enforces size limits on cached data:\n\n```javascript\nclass MemoryLimitedMap extends Map {\n    constructor(maxBytes) {\n        super();\n        this.maxBytes = bytes.parse(maxBytes);\n        this.currentBytes = 0;\n    }\n    \n    set(key, value) {\n        const size = Buffer.byteLength(JSON.stringify(value));\n        if (this.currentBytes + size \u003e this.maxBytes) {\n            this.evictOldest();\n        }\n        super.set(key, value);\n        this.currentBytes += size;\n    }\n}\n```\n\n**Cache Eviction**\n\nWhen the cache exceeds `memoryCacheCapacity`:\n1. Oldest entries are evicted first (FIFO)\n2. Current byte count is decremented\n3. New entry is added\n\nSources: [default/config.yaml:196-204](), [src/util.js]() (MemoryLimitedMap), [src/endpoints/characters.js:33-36]()\n\n---\n\n## Multi-User Isolation\n\n### User Directory Isolation\n\nIn multi-user mode, each user has completely isolated data storage.\n\n**User Isolation Architecture**\n\n```mermaid\ngraph TB\n    Request[\"HTTP Request\"]\n    \n    Request --\u003e AuthMiddleware[\"requireLoginMiddleware\"]\n    AuthMiddleware --\u003e CheckSession{\"Valid\\nSession?\"}\n    CheckSession --\u003e|No| Login[\"Redirect to Login\"]\n    CheckSession --\u003e|Yes| GetUser[\"Extract user from session\"]\n    \n    GetUser --\u003e SetReqUser[\"Set request.user.profile\"]\n    SetReqUser --\u003e GetDirs[\"getUserDirectories(handle)\"]\n    GetDirs --\u003e SetReqDirs[\"Set request.user.directories\"]\n    \n    SetReqDirs --\u003e Handler[\"Route Handler\"]\n    Handler --\u003e UseDirs[\"Use request.user.directories\"]\n    \n    UseDirs --\u003e ReadPath[\"Construct file path\\nusing user directories\"]\n    ReadPath --\u003e FSOperation[\"Perform file operation\"]\n```\n\n**Directory Cache**\n\nUser directories are cached to avoid repeated path construction [src/users.js:36]():\n\n```javascript\nconst DIRECTORIES_CACHE = new Map();\n```\n\n**User Data Separation**\n\n| Resource | Single-User Path | Multi-User Path |\n|----------|------------------|-----------------|\n| Characters | `data/default/characters/` | `data/{handle}/characters/` |\n| Chats | `data/default/chats/` | `data/{handle}/chats/` |\n| Settings | `data/default/settings.json` | `data/{handle}/settings.json` |\n| Secrets | `data/default/secrets.json` | `data/{handle}/secrets.json` |\n\n**Cross-User Protection**\n\nThe middleware ensures:\n- Users cannot access other users' directories\n- File paths are always relative to user's root\n- Path traversal attacks are prevented\n- User handles are sanitized\n\nSources: [src/users.js:36](), [src/users.js:136-167](), [src/middleware/requireLogin.js](), [default/config.yaml:104]()"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"31:T584c,"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"# Character
